name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Jasmine Crockett Threatened to Beat Me Up
body:
They hate me because I am fighting for you
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kLFuwjAQhp_G2Yh8Z8dOBg8tKJWKVFXqQBkdO4DBJsEOidKnr6CU9e67-z_9OvTe7WZF5CtBPDibCCJhLwTxsp1CvB7D-m2xpvNqcREfobhtcflAR3zCZ6OLy-eXjd1SJ306pu_GxxGe-DD37RN-hOZt0M7fpnKVWcV2lvKsVSA5Sg5VSbODKpjgQgpgvDEVlUwLw8xOQNnoigFUmVNIsaAMGfBCIuQaSuRVI6y0QC02hNN7Tq5DG53RkIZJx9h1ITddyLw6DEOf7mI1wXqKXX6-Gt9e09-Z6QLB-qFMsB4J1vPpvdycl2G7Iay-l8ZWm_kH0jTv-ywq20_Oe5eEJJzu_99ko8LfAAAA__-TIG-F)
| | | |
---
Patriot – Jasmine Crockett uploaded a _**sickening**_ and _**depraved**_ video depicting her, and Rep. AOC, towering over **a helpless, incapacitated Republican,** and beating him with their fists and feet while **he lays defenseless on the ground.**
_**This is another grotesque celebration of violence from the party that burned and looted our country in 2020, that tried to murder President Trump twice, and that sends me violent threats almost every day.**_
Almost every single day, **I’m bombarded with death threats,** all fueled by the relentless, **hateful rhetoric spewed by the media** and amplified by **unhinged politicians like Crockett and AOC.**
I’ve had sitting members of Congress go on live television, and openly call for “ _actual weapons_ ” to be turned against me – just like what we saw in Butler, PA where a radical leftist claimed the life of Corey Comperatore, seriously wounded two others, and came less than an inch from ending President Trump’s life: **Real _guns_ , real _violence_ , real _blood_.**
**AOC herself said it best: “When we incite violence with depictions against our colleagues, that trickles down into violence in this country, and that is where we must draw the line.”**
That’s a far cry from her being depicted in this video beating a Republican senseless. **These people are all vicious hypocrites.**
I have a family. I was a very successful businesswoman before I ran for Congress. I’ve got loved ones who rely on me. I had a good life before all of this and I left that peace and privacy behind because I love this country, and I knew that Congress needed a fighter.
**I am under constant threats due to the violent rhetoric constantly pushed out by the left.**
_**[I’ve had to dig into my savings to pay for private security, I’ve had to take resources away from my re-election fights to fund my protection, and honestly I need your help](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8HOmzAQhJ_G3ED22kA4cGh_lB4iVZV6aU_I2BviFONkbYLy9pWjKMed-bQzo_1tcednz9rvDODibGQATH5jAPe_u6ft6k8_yhN_DuW9-enr7MLXG33AB16Nru-_flsKXzrqf9f4Z1roIT54et7wA79DK_TaLVlth8L28my5KrAXrYJWie7Ai0tvjQSsa8V1IzsJtZhaVM1BTaJTpkMsXA8cai5BClW3ICotDqC6qbGtFdzCxBR_5VTaIzmjRUy7JgrBVyb4YukvKd3iq9iRwTGi2Qir3a2ENhMMjl7TNZDDcibEFctzoNKEdSaMMdtpHm1Yx-BHpDGmUqeR4vjuxfNfedySH2PYyCCTw2oWBk2WPFq3eSaHid5KQsr3ToJBQ7kNuXVmcki0YUG9ve1uWVxsWqb4_FqWdzx6-B8AAP__ZyiQPA)**_**.**
If you’re able, please chip in whatever you can so I can keep myself, my loved ones, and my staff safe.
_**[I hate to ask, but I truly need the help right now](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8HOmzAQhJ_G3ED22kA4cGh_lB4iVZV6aU_I2BviFONkbYLy9pWjKMed-bQzo_1tcednz9rvDODibGQATH5jAPe_u6ft6k8_yhN_DuW9-enr7MLXG33AB16Nru-_flsKXzrqf9f4Z1roIT54et7wA79DK_TaLVlth8L28my5KrAXrYJWie7Ai0tvjQSsa8V1IzsJtZhaVM1BTaJTpkMsXA8cai5BClW3ICotDqC6qbGtFdzCxBR_5VTaIzmjRUy7JgrBVyb4YukvKd3iq9iRwTGi2Qir3a2ENhMMjl7TNZDDcibEFctzoNKEdSaMMdtpHm1Yx-BHpDGmUqeR4vjuxfNfedySH2PYyCCTw2oWBk2WPFq3eSaHid5KQsr3ToJBQ7kNuXVmcki0YUG9ve1uWVxsWqb4_FqWdzx6-B8AAP__ZyiQPA)**_**.**
[DONATE](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8HOmzAQhJ_G3ED22kA4cGh_lB4iVZV6aU_I2BviFONkbYLy9pWjKMed-bQzo_1tcednz9rvDODibGQATH5jAPe_u6ft6k8_yhN_DuW9-enr7MLXG33AB16Nru-_flsKXzrqf9f4Z1roIT54et7wA79DK_TaLVlth8L28my5KrAXrYJWie7Ai0tvjQSsa8V1IzsJtZhaVM1BTaJTpkMsXA8cai5BClW3ICotDqC6qbGtFdzCxBR_5VTaIzmjRUy7JgrBVyb4YukvKd3iq9iRwTGi2Qir3a2ENhMMjl7TNZDDcibEFctzoNKEdSaMMdtpHm1Yx-BHpDGmUqeR4vjuxfNfedySH2PYyCCTw2oWBk2WPFq3eSaHid5KQsr3ToJBQ7kNuXVmcki0YUG9ve1uWVxsWqb4_FqWdzx6-B8AAP__ZyiQPA)
_In Liberty,_

[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8HOmzAQhJ_G3ED22kA4cGh_lB4iVZV6aU_I2BviFONkbYLy9pWjKMed-bQzo_1tcednz9rvDODibGQATH5jAPe_u6ft6k8_yhN_DuW9-enr7MLXG33AB16Nru-_flsKXzrqf9f4Z1roIT54et7wA79DK_TaLVlth8L28my5KrAXrYJWie7Ai0tvjQSsa8V1IzsJtZhaVM1BTaJTpkMsXA8cai5BClW3ICotDqC6qbGtFdzCxBR_5VTaIzmjRUy7JgrBVyb4YukvKd3iq9iRwTGi2Qir3a2ENhMMjl7TNZDDcibEFctzoNKEdSaMMdtpHm1Yx-BHpDGmUqeR4vjuxfNfedySH2PYyCCTw2oWBk2WPFq3eSaHid5KQsr3ToJBQ7kNuXVmcki0YUG9ve1uWVxsWqb4_FqWdzx6-B8AAP__ZyiQPA)

name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: why the hell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

| **Today marks 15 years since the Affordable Care Act was passed.**

_But the Trump administration is launching a full-scale attack on the ACA!_

**Sign the petition:[Protect the Affordable Care Act →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104366496/535133437/-890314822?refcode=email_032325_aca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWRmOGRjOS1mNzA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jACtJgYrSwL7pPPht1P1n7p7iW_QADyiMz9pMKsps5A=&emci=90df8dc9-f707-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=95df8dc9-f707-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=13185894)** | | [Sign the petition →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104366500/535133443/1309378607?refcode=email_032325_aca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWRmOGRjOS1mNzA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jACtJgYrSwL7pPPht1P1n7p7iW_QADyiMz9pMKsps5A=&emci=90df8dc9-f707-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=95df8dc9-f707-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=13185894)
---
Derek,

When the Affordable Care Act became law in 2010, it changed everything. Millions of Americans finally got access to affordable health care—young adults could stay on their parents' plans, people with pre-existing conditions were protected, and financial ruin from medical bills became less of a threat.

**Today, more than 24 million people rely on ACA coverage.**

_But healthcare for those Americans is at risk._

The Trump administration just issued its first major set of proposed changes to the Affordable Care Act that will make it harder for Americans to sign up for coverage—the first step of their Project 2025 plan to dismantle the program.

Chris Deluzio knows what’s at stake, and he’s in this fight to defend the ACA and ensure every American can see a doctor without fear of financial devastation.
[**Chris will do everything in his power to protect the Affordable Care Act, but we need to show overwhelming support nationwide. So on the anniversary of the ACA’s passing, will you please sign our petition to Protect the Affordable Care Act?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104366502/535133448/1309378607?refcode=email_032325_aca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWRmOGRjOS1mNzA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jACtJgYrSwL7pPPht1P1n7p7iW_QADyiMz9pMKsps5A=&emci=90df8dc9-f707-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=95df8dc9-f707-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=13185894)
| [Sign the petition →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104366504/535133451/1309378607?refcode=email_032325_aca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWRmOGRjOS1mNzA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jACtJgYrSwL7pPPht1P1n7p7iW_QADyiMz9pMKsps5A=&emci=90df8dc9-f707-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=95df8dc9-f707-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=13185894)

name: Fair Fight Action
subject: State lawmakers are trying to pass their own versions of this nationwide voter suppression bill
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104366611/535133567/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250323_f_StateProofCitizenship_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODU2MGJjMy1mNzA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ACFC4x0NURhk_4eO_5xBqjt4UOQfwAiKwB7HCImPAHo=&emci=b4560bc3-f707-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=b8560bc3-f707-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1037277)

| | Team: A few weeks ago, we sent you a message about a **nationwide voter suppression bill** that extremist politicians are trying to pass through Congress. But there’s another alarming dimension to this threat: lawmakers around the country are moving forward with **state-level versions of this legislation.** Quick recap: the SAVE Act could disenfranchise millions of Americans — disproportionately hurting young people, low-income people, communities of color, rural residents, and women. How? By requiring people to prove their citizenship with documents like passports or birth certificates before registering to vote or updating their registration. Millions of Americans either don’t have or can’t easily access those documents. And as many as 69 million women in America who changed their names when they got married wouldn't be able to verify their citizenship with birth certificates that don’t have those new names. **If this law gets through Congress, it could block millions of eligible Americans from voting. ** **But even if it doesn't pass in Washington, lawmakers in 23 states are trying to pass their own versions of this unnecessary, harmful bill.** **We’re raising the alarm and fighting back.** At Fair Fight Action, we’re connecting the dots between these threats to our freedoms as they pop up in state capitols around the country. And we’re working alongside partners to stop this type of dangerous legislation in its tracks. [**But we’re counting on grassroots support to make sure all voters can make their voices heard in our democracy. Will you make a donation of $25 or any amount today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104366612/535133568/-814815813?amount=25&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250323_f_StateProofCitizenship_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODU2MGJjMy1mNzA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ACFC4x0NURhk_4eO_5xBqjt4UOQfwAiKwB7HCImPAHo=) | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104366613/535133569/-814815813?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250323_f_StateProofCitizenship_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODU2MGJjMy1mNzA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ACFC4x0NURhk_4eO_5xBqjt4UOQfwAiKwB7HCImPAHo=)
---
Let’s be clear: there’s no need for burdensome new requirements for voters to verify their citizenship.
It’s already against the law for people who aren’t citizens to vote. False claims about this have been widely debunked, and these bills can fan the flames of those conspiracy theories — which sets the stage for future attempts to overturn free and fair elections.
Legislation like this can also end mail-in and online voter registration, ban third-party registration drives, and upend automatic voter registration.
**Lawmakers should be focusing on solving real problems in people’s lives — not making it harder for everyone to have an equal say in our elections, and not creating new barriers for communities that already have unequal access to the ballot box.**
We are pushing back against this new wave of anti-voter legislation — analyzing and shining a light on the harm these bills could cause, building public pressure, and ensuring Americans have accurate information about their rights and registration requirements.
[**Please chip in right now to help defeat new attempts at voter suppression and help protect the freedom to vote.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104366614/535133570/-814815813?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250323_f_StateProofCitizenship_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODU2MGJjMy1mNzA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ACFC4x0NURhk_4eO_5xBqjt4UOQfwAiKwB7HCImPAHo=)

clean_body: | | | Team: A few weeks ago, we sent you a message about a nationwide voter suppression bill that extremist politicians are trying to pass through Congress. But there’s another alarming dimension to this threat: lawmakers around the country are moving forward with state-level versions of this legislation. Quick recap: the SAVE Act could disenfranchise millions of Americans — disproportionately hurting young people, low-income people, communities of color, rural residents, and women. How? By requiring people to prove their citizenship with documents like passports or birth certificates before registering to vote or updating their registration. Millions of Americans either don’t have or can’t easily access those documents. And as many as 69 million women in America who changed their names when they got married wouldn't be able to verify their citizenship with birth certificates that don’t have those new names. If this law gets through Congress, it could block millions of eligible Americans from voting. But even if it doesn't pass in Washington, lawmakers in 23 states are trying to pass their own versions of this unnecessary, harmful bill. We’re raising the alarm and fighting back. At Fair Fight Action, we’re connecting the dots between these threats to our freedoms as they pop up in state capitols around the country. And we’re working alongside partners to stop this type of dangerous legislation in its tracks. = | = Let’s be clear: there’s no need for burdensome new requirements for voters to verify their citizenship. It’s already against the law for people who aren’t citizens to vote. False claims about this have been widely debunked, and these bills can fan the flames of those conspiracy theories — which sets the stage for future attempts to overturn free and fair elections. Legislation like this can also end mail-in and online voter registration, ban third-party registration drives, and upend automatic voter registration. Lawmakers should be focusing on solving real problems in people’s lives — not making it harder for everyone to have an equal say in our elections, and not creating new barriers for communities that already have unequal access to the ballot box. We are pushing back against this new wave of anti-voter legislation — analyzing and shining a light on the harm these bills could cause, building public pressure, and ensuring Americans have accurate information about their rights and registration requirements. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thank you for staying vigilant against these threats to our democracy. name: Sonic Whistle
subject: Loudest whistle on Earth... yours complimentary. [Hotlist Only.]
body:
Here's a whistle that's 150 decibels.
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20755/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/f554d4a755d4707c2dc099c0d25e58990510032d). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.

Dear Freedom Loving Survivalist: Here's a whistle that's **150 decibels.** In case you're not familiar, that's **louder than a jet engine** (135db) **... a canned air horn**(130db)**..._or a rifle shot_**(140db).
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20755/6374453/d7b9319f6930f0f815bd656ca14265b799194d0b/f554d4a755d4707c2dc099c0d25e58990510032d)
---
And today... it's **Yours FREE!** [**> > Okay, I Want One! <<**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20755/6374453/dec34c255c52864014532a91e220b9b13b595a7c/f554d4a755d4707c2dc099c0d25e58990510032d) It's yet another **new product** that I want YOU and other hotlist guys to test out. I'll admit, it doesn't look like any whistle you've ever seen before. We call it the **TRS Sonic Whistle.** And man, is it LOUD. **Freakishly loud.** This will blow the eardrums off a burglar or home invader and have him _running for his life._ It's also very practical for hunting, camping, fishing, hiking or **any situation****where you could find yourself lost** and in need of help. Right now this is the "go-to" whistle for **cops, security guards, coaches, lifeguards, survivalists, and search-and-rescue teams** \-- just to name a few. **Best Part:** Right here, right now, by special invitation only, (you had to receive an email from me), I will rush you one of these TRS Sonic Whistles... **For FREE!** [**> > Claim Yours HERE! <<**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20755/6374453/dec34c255c52864014532a91e220b9b13b595a7c/f554d4a755d4707c2dc099c0d25e58990510032d) **No strings attached.** But there are **just 200 free samples** to go around. I expect these to be gone fast. If you reach a **"SOLD OUT"** page then sorry, you're too late. So get there now, while you can. For a safe life... Jimbo
FightFast/TRS Survival **P.S.** Please, **act now** if you want in on this hotlist product test. Thanks, I'll see you there.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Teaching the Ten Commandments to children
body:
Brand-new kid's book "The 10 Commandments for Kids"
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?
| | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1de6e0a36198402891c5d363efefea4a&_e=iSxGTxRvSKEHv8uLx-_91CJnum-0ZbRwMI3czjz5aPp_ikggVkVtDMUyE2Kg4bF2LvVu4N2Apdg9XULAtiwQSXoV8u3OKyYtPBZFCQDHC8ITg_th5WVVZp6-ZoyxBG8-DkhxOpZVpc1vz3mByAf8SowLO4gphNPnUB-5Mi08U11U2II3HzDRnuOMmgL6UE1Hg-59f5HMsChlros3bkjANcPmRbiNakQxkvauDnywyM418Am0aHKKrTos8_c0Z6Tm-fytHwGc3a_F1Amf8a3_1xXwtK32XSWqGvoyiuDgXXwPiLiEECTCoD2tR1yX6MD_k28HCpfFqkcCE0RV_ISf7Ba8l-elJuwEozsSm2Pz_NGbwpKqT8E8IEk9XnWbTeyt)
---
Hello Friend,

Despite court rulings in Louisiana and Oklahoma that make the teaching of the Bible and the 10 Commandments mandatory in public schools and universities, we still live in a time when the foundational teachings of the Ten Commandments are no longer emphasized in our public schools and daily lives. As a result, our children are growing up without these essential, God-honoring rules for living.

In this culture of moral confusion, the Ten Commandments provide clear, simple answers about what it means to live a righteous life. Teaching these commandments to children not only instills a sense of security and purpose but also fosters emotional resilience, intellectual acuity, and ethical integrity. The Ten Commandments uphold traditional values and celebrate the family unit as foundational to society, helping children navigate life's challenges with confidence and grace.
---
| | That's why I'm excited to introduce my brand new kids book, _The 10 Commandments for Kids_ book. This book offers kids ten Bible lessons about God's simple rules for living, with each chapter explaining one commandment, discussion questions, applications, and prayers to say together. It's a trustworthy resource for children to read on their own, during church services, or as part of vacation Bible school studies.
---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1de6e0a36198402891c5d363efefea4a&_e=iSxGTxRvSKEHv8uLx-_91CJnum-0ZbRwMI3czjz5aPp_ikggVkVtDMUyE2Kg4bF2LvVu4N2Apdg9XULAtiwQSXoV8u3OKyYtPBZFCQDHC8ITg_th5WVVZp6-ZoyxBG8-DkhxOpZVpc1vz3mByAf8SowLO4gphNPnUB-5Mi08U11U2II3HzDRnuOMmgL6UE1Hg-59f5HMsChlros3bkjANcPmRbiNakQxkvauDnywyM425TSoF3Yp8iBXHhd38NEA7BJbuGUQKQMZhLDQk-mb2KMkpQe9UQ4PRHX1oK_KU3IEM3yQ5NELwYa5B5oq3wqwAVTStwY62ZQx3DGyk_AFgTSGjNnFTDLnGQdDMAvksCbLOlOtatmw51TLw_9SVoH8)
---
| | Additionally, for the adults in your life, I've written,_The 10: How to Live and Love in a World That Has Lost Its Way_. This book will refresh your understanding and application of the Ten Commandments, showing how living by these principles can improve our personal lives, relationships, churches, and communities.

**I encourage you to point your children or grandchildren towards Jesus Christ.**

For a gift of any amount to support Pathway to Victory, I will send you both books: [https://secure.ptv.org/the-10-commandments-for-kids-generous-gift-1](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1de6e0a36198402891c5d363efefea4a&_e=iSxGTxRvSKEHv8uLx-_91CJnum-0ZbRwMI3czjz5aPp_ikggVkVtDMUyE2Kg4bF2LvVu4N2Apdg9XULAtiwQSXoV8u3OKyYtPBZFCQDHC8ITg_th5WVVZp6-ZoyxBG8-DkhxOpZVpc1vz3mByAf8SowLO4gphNPnUB-5Mi08U11U2II3HzDRnuOMmgL6UE1Hg-59f5HMsChlros3bkjANcPmRbiNakQxkvauDnywyM5fQEnenIe2XUEetfDB_-M3zlaCs-r56fiyCeMpT4qSoj_8xNr6f7MQPoklIZw03-5ZODF4-n3QLWET6eaS1UVYBLf5A7LC1_lgvIEWnh5bRlUbEiEi5BWqKhplK_Q8EGGWQpGcPTTTIvF11xKlfidB)

Your generosity enables _Pathway to Victory_ to share bold biblical truths with a broken world. Together, we will make a difference and bring people closer to Christ.

Thank you for standing with us and sharing the gospel of Jesus Christ.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

Pathway To Victory
PO Box 223609
Dallas, TX 75222-3609
[
Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=1de6e0a36198402891c5d363efefea4a&_t=JVGBPDFhuxfJJ3A36FwuUK-0TtFFpVN311nqfFs7js2MhkBns4KsSHejl2wtKul_MFDvnAhN46IEbVKBRpxqCupe2tCWikIfbS5FoiVx-TvPiyCspne9JDaV2tn0YqtA)

name: Wisconsin Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Elon Musk is trying to tip the scales in favor of the MAGA movement
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
Elon Musk’s influence in state-level politics is only growing. We’re relying on grassroots donors to help our party compete against the GOP’s billionaires in states like Wisconsin and nationwide. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**The richest man in the world is backing a MAGA takeover in the states.** In 2024, Elon Musk spent over $288 million to re-elect Donald Trump and fuel extreme Republican candidates to victory nationwide. Now, he’s dumped _millions_ into Wisconsin’s Supreme Court race to tip the scales in favor of the MAGA movement and elect a pro-Trump justice, securing a conservative majority on the court. **MAGA Musk’s influence in state-level politics is only growing. We’re relying on grassroots donors to help our party compete against the GOP’s billionaires in states like Wisconsin and nationwide.** [Every grassroots donation helps counter extreme Republican spending in state legislative races. name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: Who is Derrick Van Orden?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Western Wisconsin needs someone in D.C. who can get things done.
| Peter,

Western Wisconsin needs someone in D.C. who can get things done.

That can’t be said about my opponent and our current incumbent Derrick Van Orden. And before you ask, yes, these are all real headlines:
---
[](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=BEWizJLS2q5R&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-22_1&amount=25)
[_**If you are sick and tired of seeing extremists keep their seats while only getting headlines like these, please split a donation between our campaign and Fight for Progress PAC today. Van Orden is vulnerable, and our chances of unseat him are better than ever headed into the 2026 midterm.**_](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=hXk76OhNgdv7&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-22_1&amount=25)
| If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | [ DONATE $5 ](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=VTRaCwLYP12Z&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-22_1&express_lane=true&amount=5)
---
At a time when our district, our farmers, small businesses, and veterans are all struggling, Van Orden is _still_ making more headlines for his unhinged, inappropriate antics than actually helping our district as a legislator.

Just take this line from _The Bulwark_ :
| | _“Of the thirty-two bills and resolutions Van Orden sponsored in the 118th U.S. Congress (2023–24), exactly none became law; just three bills passed the GOP-controlled House before dying in the Senate.. a legislative titan he is not.

**Despite this sorry record, Van Orden has nonetheless managed to make a name for himself in Congress... crudest, meanest, dumbest, and most obnoxious.”**_
---
In the past month alone, he’s called local town hall participants Nazis and threatened online commenters to fight him.

Maybe this is why Van Orden relies on dark money instead of grassroots support. And over the past few months, Van Orden has been cozying up to Elon Musk and his elite buddies – threatening career retaliation over anyone critical of Musk or this administration.

[_**Van Orden is NOT working for us, and we have a shot to elect a real, Wisconsin-first leader to Congress – but I can’t do it without your help. Will you split a donation of $5, or whatever you can, between Fight for Progress PAC and our campaign to send Derrick Van Orden packing?**_](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=uhFwgj9fLRnC&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-22_1&amount=25)
| If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | [ CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=bJBeKJUUisPT&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-22_1&express_lane=true&amount=5)
---
| [ CONTRIBUTE $10 ](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=HofjYnlqwWAO&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-22_1&express_lane=true&amount=10)
---
| [ CONTRIBUTE $25 ](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=NpLha9e3aVjM&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-22_1&express_lane=true&amount=25)
---
| [ CONTRIBUTE $50 ](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=dKd8JldBHpCm&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-22_1&express_lane=true&amount=50)
---
| [ OTHER AMOUNT ](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=n19U1VKxfJUT&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-22_1&express_lane=true)
---
I appreciate your support, Peter.

Rebecca
* * *
| | [

](https://fight4progress.org/wrapper?t=iXnJ79HMHARC&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-22_1&amount=25)
---

name: David Nammo, Christian Legal Society
subject: Most Christians don’t realize this…
body:
A 50-state strategy| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d16f8489a50749cdbc3fc39cc13d485d&_e=fOkoJAN8UEECYc15BKwedHgQKIWoThqFAMijsgu7Tn-qPn6ycF0ADciJQlRLyy9TKUakkxKgT3pUzk05MDZS1kpn--oxst0sPYynKNC193_FNE35pHtF7wHprQo60C4um6ubbEeR09GJ3P1Wnps9QjKkwzUPomkA1qHhjjwVVs_V4luWVA6RoI-UE0gh0AQnAZfWoki4HO11K8p4vG4fdikN93UTmKj5GJ-2pfWF9bE9eC1qio4NS8R3nfKRQCmyjF2tjDVr5GNkQ3iZ1QhmQZokRt4hZ6IlIX02Fu9XL46xW5uspE0j73kTfdhQrVd-)
---
Friend, This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life . . . yet most Christians in America don't know anything about it! **The last, and strongest, line of legal defense for Christians in the United States may soon be destroyed by ideological activists, with a regulatory change being considered in ALL 50 states.** That could make critical legal victories for Americans of faith--like protection of **personal prayer** without getting fired, protection of **moral conscience** so you can't be forced to dispense abortion-inducing drugs, and even protection of students forming a **Christian student club** --IMPOSSIBLE to pursue . . . . . . and leave Christians and Americans of faith, alongside religious ministries, nonprofits, and schools, without ANY legal defense when they wrongly and unconstitutionally face threats or punishment for their biblical values! **%FIRST%, Christian Legal Society, a fellowship, ministry, and legal defense organization since 1961, is leading the fight to protect Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, state by state.** _**[_**Against a well-organized, well-funded opposition, we're counting on the support of generous Americans of faith like you to stand with us. Would you consider a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help support Christian Legal Society in this critical work?**_](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d16f8489a50749cdbc3fc39cc13d485d&_e=fOkoJAN8UEECYc15BKwedHgQKIWoThqFAMijsgu7Tn-qPn6ycF0ADciJQlRLyy9TKUakkxKgT3pUzk05MDZS1kpn--oxst0sPYynKNC193_FNE35pHtF7wHprQo60C4um6ubbEeR09GJ3P1Wnps9QjKkwzUPomkA1qHhjjwVVs8qAaVr8OQMYZLaf5wi9x3dGL38MQp2YIzyJ-84SZwdEiKwGIX0A3UG3BvZxu7prNusL_mIN_KD3TCNqzdlRbzUZoF2kVwtGExMFQ3v7J1IAWiLowXO4kgxSS9M147grOlTwBUbYWuwDn4zPrh31hFA)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d16f8489a50749cdbc3fc39cc13d485d&_e=fOkoJAN8UEECYc15BKwedHgQKIWoThqFAMijsgu7Tn-qPn6ycF0ADciJQlRLyy9TKUakkxKgT3pUzk05MDZS1kpn--oxst0sPYynKNC193_FNE35pHtF7wHprQo60C4um6ubbEeR09GJ3P1Wnps9QjKkwzUPomkA1qHhjjwVVs8TgzNQgG1MYt1SxGrZrgAZeRfY31ddsh6bOFSuaVXFmsXLSMLIW3WPc6zCRo2_NoMi2Ld0SCpFImWyE98K93Ih_c7XW-H-3K3r0eWNSw01A5TIIrDWBcFlUL9OMvT3sW-oUKRvylZs5VBV9Z7Vxs0p)
---
For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association. **But its impact has devastating real-world consequences for Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing and punishment of Christian attorneys --and the faithful Americans they would otherwise defend--seems to be the sole goal of this rule change.** Without any examples of why it's needed . . . without any response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar Association offered no response to rightful concerns that radical activists could use this to:
* **discourage or punish attorneys** from sharing political, social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as "progressive" or "Woke");

* **stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches,** sitting on church boards, or serving schools they've gone to, if those schools are Christian or otherwise religious;

* **prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries** , no matter how much good work those ministries do in their communities; and

* **put an end to Christian attorneys doing pro bono work****to defend religious freedom** on behalf of Christian ministries, nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to biblical values!

**%FIRST%, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root in America . . . but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major investment of time, talent, and legal work.** Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN this fight--and preserve religious freedom and protection for Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith--I'm counting on your support. _**[_**Can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help Christian Legal Society save these critical protections for Christian attorneys . . . and every ministry, nonprofit, or believer that those same attorneys would defend?**_](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d16f8489a50749cdbc3fc39cc13d485d&_e=fOkoJAN8UEECYc15BKwedHgQKIWoThqFAMijsgu7Tn-qPn6ycF0ADciJQlRLyy9TKUakkxKgT3pUzk05MDZS1kpn--oxst0sPYynKNC193_FNE35pHtF7wHprQo60C4um6ubbEeR09GJ3P1Wnps9QjKkwzUPomkA1qHhjjwVVs_iBVt8FKXvZNdUKJ1h8t1S0PcJLs05v5oWAssIMhkZZuS8Jchd9Atc9WndbfuGmyBrJHfqD1WHV-IsRmAeIWPxEaAcZBcF4e_qFtXtvNn90rgHV9xD6OQVyvVFRMAk7YbEAVmB9ml0ojwWJ75jJtHU)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d16f8489a50749cdbc3fc39cc13d485d&_e=fOkoJAN8UEECYc15BKwedHgQKIWoThqFAMijsgu7Tn-qPn6ycF0ADciJQlRLyy9TKUakkxKgT3pUzk05MDZS1kpn--oxst0sPYynKNC193_FNE35pHtF7wHprQo60C4um6ubbEeR09GJ3P1Wnps9QjKkwzUPomkA1qHhjjwVVs9CB6PBBvt29h4KKZ4zDVU_wrC3wAIJXGWC-a90_cXIBmq5tehNQI4uTRWXp5huRNivcK6zmjet_RgEek6YzDTSNRshC1sR1MesKqDnud5OMJ7lwSPdMwvmzwUnIEUQLTvUKVA-eADtzeU1kwHxtfZC)
---
Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been a fellowship of Christians dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society's Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in the public square. **No other organization is leading the charge to defend Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith on this critical issue like Christian Legal Society.** _**[That's why I encourage you--and hope--that you'll make your most generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now to help Christian Legal Society WIN critical victories in the battles still to come.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d16f8489a50749cdbc3fc39cc13d485d&_e=fOkoJAN8UEECYc15BKwedHgQKIWoThqFAMijsgu7Tn-qPn6ycF0ADciJQlRLyy9TKUakkxKgT3pUzk05MDZS1kpn--oxst0sPYynKNC193_FNE35pHtF7wHprQo60C4um6ubbEeR09GJ3P1Wnps9QjKkwzUPomkA1qHhjjwVVs-QmZGF0cm60Vk6QHvjTq4XR2RMo8bhK0IluUWf_pNzR4KUkOSPGAjUt6Zq3f00PmtMW8g5cM2WPUJKwuWhIoy7i8GwKjH5wtsOMPoylNzkR6VG3YJezZZLN3lr5FvfO0YzzJxBTD26fN4Jd9BhTUn1)**_ Thank you for your support and for your prayerful consideration. David Nammo
Executive Director & CEO
Christian Legal Society

Hiya Peter! It’s Oliver and Petey, spokes-pups for our dad -- Eric. We saw that today was National Puppy Day (that means treats!) so we decided to reach out. Our dad is so focused on chasing this big, mean orange ball with a yellow fluff on top that he’s not been able to play as much lately. Paw paw says it’s the most important thing he’s ever done. We want to help catch him so we might get a big playtime too. [**Will you give us a treat on our big day by making a contribootion to our dad’s campaign right now? He has a big deadline next week! We’ll be the goodest boys, and your dollars will help dad.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104367168/535135141/1514584251?refcode=em-3.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjFiNmViYS1mODA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_s2sqecreTVAQr2zWHDKBYN7I_39QtFKLYzpabBrUNw=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104367169/535135142/1514584251?refcode=em-3.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjFiNmViYS1mODA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_s2sqecreTVAQr2zWHDKBYN7I_39QtFKLYzpabBrUNw=)
_Dad won’t roll over for the mean orange ball, but I love to roll over!_ We don’t like the bad hoomans who keep making dad run a “race” without us. It means he’s not always home, but once in a while dad wins and then it’s a big happy time for everyone! We'll do anything for our paw paw, and we want to get back to a big happy time. We hope we can count on your help to get us there, Peter. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104367170/535135143/1514584251?refcode=em-3.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjFiNmViYS1mODA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_s2sqecreTVAQr2zWHDKBYN7I_39QtFKLYzpabBrUNw=)
_You’re the best, fren._ [**Please, chip in if you can.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104367173/535135145/1514584251?refcode=em-3.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjFiNmViYS1mODA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_s2sqecreTVAQr2zWHDKBYN7I_39QtFKLYzpabBrUNw=) 🐾🐾 Love and licks, Oliver and Petey 🐾 🐾

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: Fighting oppression at home and abroad with Congresswoman Delia Ramirez:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Delia and I are demanding the president comply with court orders and reverse cruel cuts to services that families and veterans rely on. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWU8Ptg6cqCjyjzIBv6orIRtGm3SoRuxiYwRDSviOw2wIm_jgvqjQV2DNBVDnaG0b0jGtqjGeG3dOnZZ47iOxGMMPY9tUYD7_NvX6FXlFIQpNo3MoAc0PqraBKPsVYzRG_wpG0-ErgpI7diGPK94FEc_pNI3C7_JbYlVAxhqBVRxYMbLt8r9UxW-OJUzqmbtm-UJCMe-Tw3Vjop1SiQf2-SbTuilaJ5VMVO4e8gT2SDurP_ONsufjdvtSn3N5lpDWob-auBDtppwMnjGD78xOSvQ/4f1/iEyGPitvTuiwRM-Uw8iNyA/h0/h001.qRLmM2HRbuoIZnvvqeTJmftwxTfrMWbh04plfc6gbcY)
---
Friend, It’s Women’s History Month, and I’m proud to join courageous Congresswomen like Delia Ramirez, a fellow progressive leading fights against oppression at home and abroad. **Delia and I are demanding the Trump administration reverse its mass firings of federal workers** at the Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) and the Department of Veterans Affairs, which threaten essential programs that veterans and families rely on. Together, we have co-led laws for workers’ rights and expanding healthcare providers for veterans, and pushed for the human right to housing. I recently co-sponsored a bill that Delia’s leading on to**prevent ICE raids at churches, schools, hospitals, and courthouses**. We’re both proud daughters of immigrants, and we’re partnering with local immigrant rights groups in our districts to defend our neighbors and share Know Your Rights information. As the only member of Congress in a mixed-immigration-status family, Delia understands how urgently we must use our Congressional oversight authority over the president to demand the Trump administration **respect all U.S. residents’ constitutional rights to due process and free speech**. This month I co-sponsored Delia’s resolution demanding the president and his administration immediately **comply with all court orders** and respect our democratic system of checks and balances. Inside and outside Congress, we will use every tool in our power to **stop Trump and Musk’s fascist power grabs and protect the people who call this country home**. They may try to divide us, but that’s because they’re afraid of how much more powerful we are together. [**If you’re able, please split a donation between Congresswoman Delia Ramirez’s and my campaigns today so we can keep leading fights for our rights and demanding a government that works for all people, not just the billionaires in power.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJTE9HxYHFqKUIMHiT1GBldOaG2asfQHxFbzg-aKQs_GA0OXfvmEh-dc_zaZJNPXOTFzX5Ye_g7ch3mHbS3RABwo_oH_S9jOw81DA0dPecyEgDncLVOnIftAsB2_Y2HMua8UhUxa5cV4xCuM1jaabtrEEix2b33BEsoPYCspp0u0dbHcUDRHft56FZcS0D9mzz_TQ414sCXlxiFyxQJBbPCsH-Cvry0VOuaBlMHu_OkzFHyBamCSJ9GQ_Kuvz9v4exO3wAlEeqQo1NsQt1Y5DfAFe1r1p5DUXz01kWv-kt6nTKlEA1ojcgLICBHtSfvbY9_BN1J3ML5FTBhIFT2WPEIJOid01TzdFHLKruAADqcdMbvFN7NYT8tlbNbgEjWn0mC4ttFvfFFOYwbd2svD8NTwYDBHi1xNs7BkyS8UUgYkY/4f1/iEyGPitvTuiwRM-Uw8iNyA/h1/h001.JeQXj4IzH0zm7l1Vm9AuNQXpwHlcwGTUARRivKM62Ik) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Delia Ramirez_ | | | [Chip in $15 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJTE9HxYHFqKUIMHiT1GBldIm3qg18ackG0EMfYQbeoBo_DCjVZTFJI3P8SobE9o0dPdqUohTZvMoCjPePxdejQkBaMkB1GJoa6yF8AW3BI9P59XXKeOPdHNApJJ7dIccXg9PqZVx4STFjvzANRL4yCHjB4O7MbGaMXAx9FeWZNDnMyjl9oxTGtJl6QwD1OJwqR5rug_m1x01CERM1xzCFQ9_RB4Ix0TDe84eS4mAY1MFLnX6fy5YI2ZxhXamTVl6FUIA-xECL-W5whoSGI7AYm29tYvWEvC3aLdLT5P4vP1R9gk-cyfby-vaIrxcks_AwYkIFx1B7j_VL08KY2zYH9i_9hr6T6HcECUfhnaBKnFB_9rAciRC6zAb_zasP4rTzInu4SHlr4rgW9NDd-CiJb7LXh5NVdvNMiIWN_NZuZuslYZJjReSgVJgx5ypp4qL39tZEWklbFGCEK2QDSOkGhgnJ45kaseZFHkmto2kjDAs/4f1/iEyGPitvTuiwRM-Uw8iNyA/h2/h001.UTC5IApuVNa05NPzgGmugNdKFFS2kHwTITzZguQOWF8)

Subject: Fighting oppression at home and abroad with Congresswoman Delia Ramirez:

Friend,
This Women’s History Month, I’m honored to join courageous and progressive women like Congresswoman Delia Ramirez.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJTE9HxYHFqKUIMHiT1GBldOaG2asfQHxFbzg-aKQs_GDTshfcyH6r0ZgL12Z8tQ8GUaSSle4YbPDatgKvLzc6YTxmpBTYa5FOFf1T0qXglUAmCcQPM7EK_NI2G55MxP4VWmCwiysdfrEtterP7i9jHj1eYQNtSZQYFMdYI3x37HWDXh_Xq67uTl-x63p4jR-5WCPeBBIDml-LdMVJmnBkuXZ_vi7ftrl_lPBPCkEQG5GYLqnI4sGGuwINlSxuWKYVJrRHBmQSLaO498tKD_sxAOMPHzma-sfuFqv2cX0oD_5lTUEhd0b2nlMVoClXeg3WflUaNDBijUJkSlpzpNPDs2Gl1Ft_v2LlxaCdSvn5LzjLJrGERpwBcu0fVTwNKg3-F18ce72nQBqJLqVwDbNCu5QRk6Ek7xanbgJBeIOFC4A/4f1/iEyGPitvTuiwRM-Uw8iNyA/h8/h001.fnbyz0aWFLGNlUE6m8ALsRGIQxjOd6fVHAwOPPUpFZM)
**This month, I co-sponsored Delia’s resolution demanding the president and his administration comply immediately with all court orders.** She said:
_“In this country, we don't bow to kings or bend a knee to dictators. The elected president of our nation has the obligation to respect our constitution, our democratic institutions, and to honor our system of checks and balances.”_
Delia co-chairs the Congressional Homelessness Committee and is the Ranking Member of the Veterans’ Affairs Oversight and Investigation Subcommittee. **She and I have been demanding the Department of Veterans Affairs and the Department of Housing and Urban Development reverse cruel cuts** and protect the programs that veterans rely on that keep families housed, that enforce fair housing laws, and that assist first-time homebuyers in getting a mortgage.
We’ve also co-led legislation to expand healthcare providers for veterans and together we introduced the _Restaurant Workers Bill of Rights_ to demand stability, safety, and paid leave for often-exploited workers.
Both Delia and I are proud daughters of immigrants, and she’s the only member of Congress in a mixed-immigration-status family. She and I have worked with local immigrants’ rights groups in our districts to hold Know Your Rights events, and I co-sponsored a bill she’s leading to prevent ICE raids at places like churches, schools, and hospitals.
Together, Delia and I will continue resisting Trump’s attacks on our communities, defending human and civil rights for all, and fighting for a future where everyone thrives.

Delia has been a crucial partner in the fight against oppression here at home and abroad. She has co-sponsored my anti-war policies, including Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to block weapons from being used in war crimes and the _Stop Politicians Profiting from War Act_. **Our government always finds money for bombs, but none to end homelessness in our country. We’re pushing to change that.**
The Trump administration is run by billionaires, for billionaires. Along with a cabinet full of billionaires, the richest man in the world is trying to take over our government to get rich while stealing from working families. They’re trying to distract and divide us by attacking marginalized people, but we will push back and speak out against fascist fear-mongering and dehumanization.
We will use every tool at our disposal to fight back in Congress, and we will partner with grassroots movements building necessary power outside of Congress. We will keep fighting for our shared humanity and dignity for all.
Delia told her constituents recently: “Together, in the streets and in Congress, we remain courageous and organized; they will not break us.”

clean_body: Delia and I are demanding the president comply with court orders and reverse cruel cuts to services that families and veterans rely on. | | | Friend, It’s Women’s History Month, and I’m proud to join courageous Congresswomen like Delia Ramirez, a fellow progressive leading fights against oppression at home and abroad. Delia and I are demanding the Trump administration reverse its mass firings of federal workers at the Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) and the Department of Veterans Affairs, which threaten essential programs that veterans and families rely on. Together, we have co-led laws for workers’ rights and expanding healthcare providers for veterans, and pushed for the human right to housing. I recently co-sponsored a bill that Delia’s leading on toprevent ICE raids at churches, schools, hospitals, and courthouses. We’re both proud daughters of immigrants, and we’re partnering with local immigrant rights groups in our districts to defend our neighbors and share Know Your Rights information. As the only member of Congress in a mixed-immigration-status family, Delia understands how urgently we must use our Congressional oversight authority over the president to demand the Trump administration respect all U.S. residents’ constitutional rights to due process and free speech. This month I co-sponsored Delia’s resolution demanding the president and his administration immediately comply with all court orders and respect our democratic system of checks and balances. Inside and outside Congress, we will use every tool in our power to stop Trump and Musk’s fascist power grabs and protect the people who call this country home. They may try to divide us, but that’s because they’re afraid of how much more powerful we are together. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Delia Ramirez | | | | | | | | | | Thank you. With your support, we will keep pushing for a government that invests in our communities’ needs, like housing and healthcare for all—rather than weapons corporations’ profits and tax cuts for billionaires. Our federal government has moved when pushed by the people, and can still be moved. With you in this fight, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Mar 22, 2025 Subject: Fighting oppression at home and abroad with Congresswoman Delia Ramirez: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, This Women’s History Month, I’m honored to join courageous and progressive women like Congresswoman Delia Ramirez. This month, I co-sponsored Delia’s resolution demanding the president and his administration comply immediately with all court orders. She said: “In this country, we don't bow to kings or bend a knee to dictators. The elected president of our nation has the obligation to respect our constitution, our democratic institutions, and to honor our system of checks and balances.” Delia co-chairs the Congressional Homelessness Committee and is the Ranking Member of the Veterans’ Affairs Oversight and Investigation Subcommittee. She and I have been demanding the Department of Veterans Affairs and the Department of Housing and Urban Development reverse cruel cuts and protect the programs that veterans rely on that keep families housed, that enforce fair housing laws, and that assist first-time homebuyers in getting a mortgage. We’ve also co-led legislation to expand healthcare providers for veterans and together we introduced the Restaurant Workers Bill of Rights to demand stability, safety, and paid leave for often-exploited workers. Both Delia and I are proud daughters of immigrants, and she’s the only member of Congress in a mixed-immigration-status family. She and I have worked with local immigrants’ rights groups in our districts to hold Know Your Rights events, and I co-sponsored a bill she’s leading to prevent ICE raids at places like churches, schools, and hospitals. Together, Delia and I will continue resisting Trump’s attacks on our communities, defending human and civil rights for all, and fighting for a future where everyone thrives. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Delia Ramirez | | | | | | | | | Delia has been a crucial partner in the fight against oppression here at home and abroad. She has co-sponsored my anti-war policies, including Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to block weapons from being used in war crimes and the Stop Politicians Profiting from War Act. Our government always finds money for bombs, but none to end homelessness in our country. We’re pushing to change that. The Trump administration is run by billionaires, for billionaires. Along with a cabinet full of billionaires, the richest man in the world is trying to take over our government to get rich while stealing from working families. They’re trying to distract and divide us by attacking marginalized people, but we will push back and speak out against fascist fear-mongering and dehumanization. We will use every tool at our disposal to fight back in Congress, and we will partner with grassroots movements building necessary power outside of Congress. We will keep fighting for our shared humanity and dignity for all. Delia told her constituents recently: “Together, in the streets and in Congress, we remain courageous and organized; they will not break us.” With you in this fight, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I know what it’s like to have health insurance coverage denied
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I got into public service to make sure no one would ever have to go through that again.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4622%2E35263%2EuYkopY)
Peter — 15 years ago today, the _Affordable Care Act_ became the law of the land. Since then, millions of Americans — all with different health conditions, ages, and backgrounds — have been able to receive essential, affordable medical care. The fight for affordable health care has always been personal for me: **I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care — and before we passed the _Affordable Care Act_ , insurance companies could deny people like me health coverage.** When I was a child, I was diagnosed with a serious illness and spent three months in the hospital. When I got better, my grandparents who raised me looked for an insurance policy that would cover me in the future. [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2503_ACA_Anniversary?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250323_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4622%2E35263%2EuYkopY) However, because of my previous illness, they couldn’t find such a policy. Not from any insurer. Not at any price. They had to pay for my health care out of pocket — and they had to make enormous sacrifices to do so — all because I was a child with the label **“pre-existing condition.”** Growing up, I saw my grandparents stay up nights, worried sick that I would fall ill again and they wouldn't be able to afford my care. **And I got into public service to make sure no one would ever have to go through that again.** Because of the _ACA_ , insurance companies can no longer discriminate against someone based on their pre-existing condition. I championed that health reform and fought to allow young people to stay on their parent’s insurance plans up to age 26. These policy changes have led to millions more Americans getting the health insurance they need. So, you can imagine my frustration whenever Republicans attack our health care or threaten protections for folks with pre-existing conditions. They’ve spent years playing politics with people’s lives. And if they’re successful, countless Americans could find themselves in a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules. The people of Wisconsin did not send me to Washington to take people’s health care away, which is why I continue to fight back against Republicans’ attempts to repeal the _ACA_. **[I’ll always fight to protect the _Affordable Care Act_ from the GOP’s attempts to take away our care. If you’re with me, add your name to our petition today, and help me send a message to our leaders back in Washington. ](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2503_ACA_Anniversary?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250323_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4622%2E35263%2EuYkopY)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2503_ACA_Anniversary?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250323_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=4622%2E35263%2EuYkopY)
---
I am not going to let anyone make me forget where I came from or why I got into public service in the first place. My personal experience has always inspired my work to do everything I can to make sure that every American has quality, affordable healthcare coverage.
Thank you for standing with me.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=4622%2E35263%2EuYkopY) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=4622%2E35263%2EuYkopY)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---

Kayleigh McEnany **[sounded off on Jessica Tarlov during a tense Fox News debate](https://substack.com/redirect/1048587e-7a55-4930-9022-17106c5fd678?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for defending the rampant Elon Musk Derangement Syndrome and Tesla boycotts across the country.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/1048587e-7a55-4930-9022-17106c5fd678?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/1048587e-7a55-4930-9022-17106c5fd678?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Tarlov compared ongoing Tesla boycotts to conservatives boycotting Bud Light for featuring woke transgender messaging in their marketing. "Kid Rock doing target practice with Bud Light cans. People vowing to decimate that brand. And Dylan Mulvaney has much less of an impact on people's lives than Elon Musk does! So, was that okay, or was that bad too?!"
"Last time I checked, there weren't conservatives setting Budweiser factories on fire!" McEnany interjected. "There weren't crazed conservatives keying Budweiser vehicles or trucks!"
"That wasn't happening but look at this!" she added, pointing to the screen showing **[footage of a Tesla dealership in Las Vegas buring to the ground](https://substack.com/redirect/1048587e-7a55-4930-9022-17106c5fd678?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after being set on fire by anti-Elon Musk arsonists.
"I mean, Elon Musk rescues 2 astronauts who were up there for 286 days and this is how he's thanked?!!" McEnany continued. "We'll light your businesses on fire?! He triggers the left so much!"
Watch McEnany explode at Tarlov right here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/1048587e-7a55-4930-9022-17106c5fd678?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Presented By Birch Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/650d6181-91dd-4988-b585-7bbc5c122ac2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# **The World 's Most Well-Connected Bankers Are RUSHING To Accumulate Physical Gold**
Donald Trump Jr. here with an urgent message. Central banks around the world are sending a clear warning. They're buying TONS of gold to store in their vaults.
In fact, they've purchased **more gold** in the last three years than **any other period in history**.
**Why Are Banks Making Such Aggressive Moves?** Because they're actively preparing for a world where the dollar is no longer the global reserve currency.
Meanwhile, **most Americans remain exposed** to the dollar's decline.
The good news? You can protect your savings the same way they are!
A Gold IRA lets you shield your IRA or 401(k) from the dollar's decline while maintaining all your tax advantages.
My **trusted friends at Birch Gold Group** can show you how to convert your existing retirement into physical gold. Want to see how?

# _**Resurfaced:**_**JD Vance BURNS Democrat clown Tim Walz so bad they have to cut his mic...**
Watch JD Vance **[utterly humiliate Democrat clown Tim Walz](https://substack.com/redirect/4f746571-b992-4a78-a8e8-ed5c73544a44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , Kamala Harris' running mate, during their decisive debate before the 2024 election.
Vance wrecked him so bad, CBS had to cut his mic...
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/4f746571-b992-4a78-a8e8-ed5c73544a44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

President Trump **[called Walz a"loser"](https://substack.com/redirect/05f5c4fa-e8e3-454c-80fe-472407fd2153?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** this week for suggesting he could beat up most Trump supporters.
"Well, he's a loser. Yeah. No, I think so. He lost an election," Trump said Friday, speaking to reporters from the White House. "He played a part. You know, usually a vice president doesn't play a part. They say. I think Tim played a part. I think he was so bad that he hurt her. But she hurt herself. And Joe hurt them both. They didn't have a great group, but I would probably put him at the bottom of the group."
In their debate, Vance called out Walz for the Biden administration's CBP1 App loophole which allowed illegal migrants to apply for legal asylum in the U.S. easier than ever before, circumventing the legal immigration process.
"That is the facilitation of illegal immigration by our own leadership!" Vance said before CBS silenced his microphone.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My work to expand the Metro
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Why expanding Metro light rail across Southern California is emblematic of the public service I try to embody every single day, whether as a State Senator, a member of Congress, or a U.S. Senator.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8374%2E5257348%2EtySfZK)
Derek,
One of my proudest accomplishments as a State Senator was establishing the Gold Line Metro light rail in Southern California.
I’ve worked for years to support public transit in California, and the many amazing transit workers who keep it running.
I know it might sound a bit unusual that the light rail is one of the most exciting things I’ve worked on. But let me take a moment to explain why expanding Metro light rail across Southern California is emblematic of the public service I try to embody every single day, whether as a State Senator, a member of Congress, or a U.S. Senator.
**→ It helps the environment!** The Light Rail reduces carbon emissions, decreases air pollution, and eases traffic congestion, something we have plenty of in California.
**→ It’s about working together:** During my time in the State Senate, I worked with both Democrats and Republicans to get this legislation across the finish line.
**→ It’s about listening to voters and constituents to hear what will actually make a difference:** I spoke to people in my district who were desperately hoping for an alternative way to get across town. I listened and got to work to find a solution.
**→ It’s about fixing what’s broken and setting up for future successes:** At the time I passed the Gold Line Light Rail Authority, the Metro line was dying from cost overruns. I worked to identify the issues with the service, wrote legislation to fix it, and ultimately created a model for what other mass transit projects in California would look like.
**The Metro Gold Line, now a part of the A and E Lines — thanks to more exciting rail expansions — continues to serve millions of people daily, and I’m honored to have the title, “Father of the Gold Line.”**
[**Now, as California’s Senator, I’m continuing to find innovative ways to deliver for our state. From protecting federal jobs in CA to securing federal funding for wildfire relief efforts, I will work with anyone to make our communities stronger. Please chip in to help me keep up this work for the Golden State.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q12025_abs_em.OeZ3Kx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250323_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8374%2E5257348%2EtySfZK)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19346%2E878179%2EwWG6tG). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19346%2E878179%2EwWG6tG).**

| | You probably thought the election ended on November 5th, but control of the House isn’t settled yet.

The democrats could still win control...

**Here is where things stand:**
**Republicans:****217**
**Democrats: 215**
**Undecided: 3**

If the Democrats win the three special elections in FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21, the US House would FLIP to the control of Nancy Pelosi.

My name is Jimmy Patronis, and I’m the Republican Nominee in the FL-01 race.

**I’m facing a well-funded liberal who has a real shot of beating me, and since this race isn’t getting any national attention, my campaign is seriously underfunded.**

This seat is anyone’s game, and if we want to keep our MAGA Majority in Congress, I need your financial support.

name: Stand with AOC & Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: Bernie Oligarchy Tour Alert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1011&refcode=email-032325_v&akid=7908%2E5885482%2EN3U38- ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis – Trump and Musk are
literally dismantling our democracy piece by piece.

Trump is openly flouting the rule of law, deleting entire government
agencies, and empowering Oligarchs to impose corporate rule on the
country, while Elon Musk’s DOGE is wreaking havoc inside the most
sensitive areas of government and his social media megaphone spreads lies
and attacks Trump’s enemies.

This is a five-alarm fire, and Bernie Sanders and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
are bringing every ounce of leadership they have to stop Trump and Musk,
when too many Democrats are stepping back from the fight.

This week AOC is joining Bernie on the Oligarchy Tour—a nationwide
campaign to call out the billionaires who hoard wealth and power while our
democracy crumbles. This is the kind of leadership we need. Bold,
relentless, and willing to name the real enemy: unchecked corporate power.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-032325nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7908%2E5885482%2EN3U38- ]Our Revolution has Bernie & AOC’s backs. Our Citizen Action team is on the
ground across the country taking action and building the movement to take
on Trump, Musk, and the billionaire class—but we need your help to do it.
Can you chip in today to fuel the resistance?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-032325nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7908%2E5885482%2EN3U38- ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-032325nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7908%2E5885482%2EN3U38- ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-032325nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7908%2E5885482%2EN3U38- ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-032325nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7908%2E5885482%2EN3U38- ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-032325nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7908%2E5885482%2EN3U38- ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-032325nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7908%2E5885482%2EN3U38- ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

The stakes couldn’t be higher. Trump just signed an Executive Order
abolishing the Department of Education and earlier this week told a judge
he didn’t need to answer to him – all while his enablers in Congress are
gearing up for a generational dismantling of Medicaid in order to cut
taxes for billionaires.

Musk? He’s in on it too. He’s leading the public calls to defund NPR and
PBS—because public media doesn’t bow to his billionaire agenda. And while
stripping the government to its bare bones through DOGE, he’s also
positioning himself to benefit from huge new government contracts.

Bernie & AOC see this for what it is: a full-scale attack on democracy,
and that’s why they’re taking the fight to the people who have the power
to stop Musk & Trump – the voters.

We’re mobilizing grassroots pressure to push Democrats to listen to this
desperately needed leadership while simultaneously working to take this
message directly to voters in elections like the State Supreme Court race
in Wisconsin. But we can’t do it without you.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-032325nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7908%2E5885482%2EN3U38- ]We don’t have billionaire backers. We rely on grassroots supporters like
you to fund this work. If you want a movement that will stand with Bernie
& AOC to fight like hell to stop Trump, Musk, and their billionaire
enablers, now is the time to step up.

The oligarchs have money. We have people.

Let’s show them who’s stronger.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

body:
| | | **BREAKING: Justice Sotomayor speaks out as Trump and Musk escalate attacks on the free press!**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21072?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250323-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250323-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&akid=19855%2E9716520%2EcOhryp)
**Stand with Justice Sotomayor:****[Sign our MASSIVE Democratic petition by midnight to support freedom of the press!>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21072?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250323-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250323-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&akid=19855%2E9716520%2EcOhryp)**

---

Team -- Amid Donald Trump and Elon Musk's calls to demolish vital news sources like MSNBC, PBS, and NPR, Justice Sonia Sotomayor has a _dire warning:_ **Unless we stand up for a free press and independent media, "we're going to lose our democracy."**

Justice Sotomayor is 100% correct. Without reliable sources of truthful information, our country could suffer _unimaginable harm._ But that's exactly what Trump and Musk want!

We can't sit idly by as Trump's attacks on our media expand, so **we've launched an URGENT Rapid Response Petition to show that Democrats support PBS, MSNBC, NPR, and the independent journalism that's vital to our nation.** But as of 11:10 A.M., we're still waiting for your signature, and the petition closes at midnight! **Please, sign on now:**

**[Add your signature IMMEDIATELY to stand with PBS, NPR, MSNBC, and freedom of the press>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21072?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250323-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250323-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&akid=19855%2E9716520%2EcOhryp)**
| [ADD MY NAME](https://go.dscc.org/go/21072?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250323-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250323-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&akid=19855%2E9716520%2EcOhryp)
---

Thank you,

Team DSCC

body:
| | | **Lawless felon Donald Trump is demanding House Republicans impeach federal judges that stand in the way of his assault on the Constitution. We demand Congress impeach TRUMP instead!** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsHs7iGep3vX1mO61FC5l6Sht7A47eix1sV_LW2CZCZAys1c9ksOWkDIutz9Tc4YOi-czObLPBkg4Top37si3OHEjXq6hBt6ne2okpkRti-VRU6i9yUINNWYdEisYSnZ_Ec0MfTemFQKxZAmbFqHnwcT8XKCDVUjQ46NL8pPoB6fdobNDTI40pDRDCn4sY1CLX5IEkd13Gx_cU8J_qbcTu7UIt_9EUjZuP_2srhh_10X0_StgR6hLxVCn72wrjkfoyd-nn5tfjBsHyHsrc7SOK9DSmG_ry_Ls8FPBR3EL7WxcG9SQurf9R9h23ARB_h2esUltF7FhyqMVu-eU9YNd4axRgIIA-BC1vTAJmW7xR14UQ/4f1/Hj8HQpeqS4ChJFqwC91w0A/h0/h001.6dskx-w_uK6skK3_oYnoTniyQRaoom-zLNitmKhGbxI)**[Our next ImpeachTrumpNow.com billboards will go live soon in Los Angeles. * * *
Federal judges, appointed by both Democrats and Republicans, are slowing down Donald Trump’s assault on the Constitution.
**Now, Donald Trump is screaming for those judges to be impeached, demanding to rule as a dictator.**
House Republicans wasted no time, already introducing articles of impeachment against:
* Judge James Boasberg for ordering Trump to end illegal deportation flights
* Judge Paul Engelmayer for blocking DOGE agents from accessing the Treasury Department’s payment systems
* Judge John Bates for ordering health agencies to stop censoring gender information
* Judge Amir Ali for blocking Trump’s illegal refusal to pay USAID contracts

These sham impeachments cannot stand alone as Donald Trump commits impeachable offense after impeachable offense.
_We must respond in defense of the Constitution. We must impeach Donald Trump._
Rep. Al Green has declared, “the movement to impeach the President has begun.”
**We’re answering his call with billboards and newspaper ads promoting ImpeachTrumpNow.com, where thousands of Americans have written letters to Congress.**
******[FIGHT BACK against sham impeachment of judges. DEMAND impeachment articles against Donald Trump. clean_body: | | | Lawless felon Donald Trump is demanding House Republicans impeach federal judges that stand in the way of his assault on the Constitution. We demand Congress impeach TRUMP instead! Federal judges, appointed by both Democrats and Republicans, are slowing down Donald Trump’s assault on the Constitution. Now, Donald Trump is screaming for those judges to be impeached, demanding to rule as a dictator. House Republicans wasted no time, already introducing articles of impeachment against: Judge James Boasberg for ordering Trump to end illegal deportation flights Judge Paul Engelmayer for blocking DOGE agents from accessing the Treasury Department’s payment systems Judge John Bates for ordering health agencies to stop censoring gender information Judge Amir Ali for blocking Trump’s illegal refusal to pay USAID contracts These sham impeachments cannot stand alone as Donald Trump commits impeachable offense after impeachable offense. We must respond in defense of the Constitution. We must impeach Donald Trump. Rep. Al Green has declared, “the movement to impeach the President has begun.” We’re answering his call with billboards and newspaper ads promoting ImpeachTrumpNow.com, where thousands of Americans have written letters to Congress. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. name: JanePAC
subject: What happens when you fire 1,000 scientists at the EPA? We’re about to find out.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Trump’s environmental destruction is accelerating.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104369945/535141952/1328794144?refcode=ea.fdf02be5-fe07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.fdf02be5-fe07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZkZjAyYmU1LWZlMDctZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eHrgy2SMLmXNT9MI51iEXo43kiBxZsr9AaYgz8rdinU=&emci=73a09b05-7206-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=fdf02be5-fe07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)
---
Remember when we told you that Donald Trump’s handpicked Supreme Court justices gutted a key part of the _Clean Water Act_ and made it easier for polluters to dump toxic waste into our rivers, lakes, and drinking water? _Trump is doubling down on it._ **As part of their agenda to dismantle the EPA, the Trump administration just announced a plan to dissolve its largest department, the Office of Research and Development, and fire over 1,000 scientists.** These drastic EPA cuts are crippling the agency’s ability to monitor pollution and hold corporate polluters accountable. With fewer resources and fewer scientists, experts warn this will lead to **dirtier drinking water, more lead contamination, and unchecked industrial waste flowing straight into our communities.** They know exactly what they’re doing. _They just don’t care._ If it makes Big Oil corporations richer, the rest of us can suffer and drink sewage. **[Can you rush a donation to help elect climate champions who will fight to derail Trump’s dirty agenda?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104369946/535141953/2105508926?refcode=ea.fdf02be5-fe07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.fdf02be5-fe07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZkZjAyYmU1LWZlMDctZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eHrgy2SMLmXNT9MI51iEXo43kiBxZsr9AaYgz8rdinU=)** Donald and Elon say their goal is cutting costs. But SOMEONE is going to pay for this — _and it won’t be Big Oil or billionaires._ It’s small towns and rural communities that will be hit hardest — people Trump and his allies pretend to care about, but who will be left to suffer when their water is contaminated and no one’s there to stop it. **This is why we need climate champions at every level of government — leaders who will actually fight for clean air and clean water.** **[If you’re sick of watching Donald Trump auction off our environment to the highest bidder, now’s the time to act. Chip in today to help us build a firewall of climate champions at the state and local levels and protect our communities from the chaos unfolding in Washington.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104369947/535141954/2105508926?refcode=ea.fdf02be5-fe07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.fdf02be5-fe07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZkZjAyYmU1LWZlMDctZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eHrgy2SMLmXNT9MI51iEXo43kiBxZsr9AaYgz8rdinU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104369948/535141955/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.fdf02be5-fe07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.fdf02be5-fe07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZkZjAyYmU1LWZlMDctZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eHrgy2SMLmXNT9MI51iEXo43kiBxZsr9AaYgz8rdinU=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104369949/535141956/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.fdf02be5-fe07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.fdf02be5-fe07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZkZjAyYmU1LWZlMDctZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eHrgy2SMLmXNT9MI51iEXo43kiBxZsr9AaYgz8rdinU=)
