clean_body: Trump’s environmental destruction is accelerating. | Remember when we told you that Donald Trump’s handpicked Supreme Court justices gutted a key part of the Clean Water Act and made it easier for polluters to dump toxic waste into our rivers, lakes, and drinking water? Trump is doubling down on it. As part of their agenda to dismantle the EPA, the Trump administration just announced a plan to dissolve its largest department, the Office of Research and Development, and fire over 1,000 scientists. These drastic EPA cuts are crippling the agency’s ability to monitor pollution and hold corporate polluters accountable. With fewer resources and fewer scientists, experts warn this will lead to dirtier drinking water, more lead contamination, and unchecked industrial waste flowing straight into our communities. They know exactly what they’re doing. They just don’t care. If it makes Big Oil corporations richer, the rest of us can suffer and drink sewage. = Donald and Elon say their goal is cutting costs. But SOMEONE is going to pay for this — and it won’t be Big Oil or billionaires. It’s small towns and rural communities that will be hit hardest — people Trump and his allies pretend to care about, but who will be left to suffer when their water is contaminated and no one’s there to stop it. This is why we need climate champions at every level of government — leaders who will actually fight for clean air and clean water. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s do this. — Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Emily Randall for Congress
subject: A sight for sore eyes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
Celebrating 15 years of the Affordable Care Act 🎉

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104370072/535142346/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.03.23_ACA_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDNjNTc3Mi1mZjA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uElSMMOJPdy52E4ATxOFgEpOGct1D3ukn2eLJMOaiZA=&emci=abf0b439-8306-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=943c5772-ff07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442) | **Isn’t this a sight for sore eyes?** Fifteen years ago, President Barack Obama signed the Affordable Care Act into law, transforming our healthcare system and helping millions of Americans get the coverage and care they need. Republicans have spent every minute of those fifteen years fighting tooth and nail to undo the progress we’ve made. Just days ago, the Trump administration proposed a rule to [_**shorten the enrollment period**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104370073/535142347/-2001332058?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.03.23_ACA_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDNjNTc3Mi1mZjA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uElSMMOJPdy52E4ATxOFgEpOGct1D3ukn2eLJMOaiZA=&emci=abf0b439-8306-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=943c5772-ff07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442), so Americans have less time to find an insurance plan that works for them. And Republicans in Congress are [_**taking aim at the subsidies**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104370074/535142348/-388282626?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.03.23_ACA_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDNjNTc3Mi1mZjA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uElSMMOJPdy52E4ATxOFgEpOGct1D3ukn2eLJMOaiZA=&emci=abf0b439-8306-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=943c5772-ff07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442) that allow working people to afford insurance. [_**Speaker Mike Johnson**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104370075/535142349/2018122391?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.03.23_ACA_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDNjNTc3Mi1mZjA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uElSMMOJPdy52E4ATxOFgEpOGct1D3ukn2eLJMOaiZA=&emci=abf0b439-8306-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=943c5772-ff07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442) even told a private meeting of GOP supporters last year that their plan for healthcare reform was: “No Obamacare.” **Emily understands that healthcare coverage can be life-changing for working families — and she’ll stand strong against any attempts to cut or weaken the Affordable Care Act!** [_**If you agree with Emily that we must protect and strengthen the ACA, please chip in any amount today to fuel our organizing against the GOP attacks on our healthcare and help flip the House from red to blue →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104370076/535142350/1947289852?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.03.23_ACA_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDNjNTc3Mi1mZjA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uElSMMOJPdy52E4ATxOFgEpOGct1D3ukn2eLJMOaiZA=) [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104370077/535142351/1947289852?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.03.23_ACA_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDNjNTc3Mi1mZjA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uElSMMOJPdy52E4ATxOFgEpOGct1D3ukn2eLJMOaiZA=) Thank you so much 💙 — Team Emily

clean_body: Celebrating 15 years of the Affordable Care Act 🎉 | Isn’t this a sight for sore eyes? Fifteen years ago, President Barack Obama signed the Affordable Care Act into law, transforming our healthcare system and helping millions of Americans get the coverage and care they need. Republicans have spent every minute of those fifteen years fighting tooth and nail to undo the progress we’ve made. Just days ago, the Trump administration proposed a rule to , so Americans have less time to find an insurance plan that works for them. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. =** | Paid for by Lofgren for Congress Lofgren for Congress PO Box 913 San Jose, CA 95113 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, please .

[**“The work we put in during the weeks and months ahead could make a _massive difference in fair representation._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104370640/535144248/-766669867?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGAlertNOR_email_20250323-AOTL-Tier1-AGAlertNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250323-AOTL-Tier1-AGAlertNOR_&utm_campaign=AGAlertNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3ZDg4ZGRkLWZmMDctZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TiOenZGxZt94q1fIq7R8YQj97ex4M2VKNYF5RiH8unw=) We must not wait, we must not waver — the stakes are simply too high.” — Eric H. 82nd Attorney General

**He’s always the first to remind us that there is no cavalry coming — WE are the ones responsible for protecting our democracy.**

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T829a3b95-21b0-4289-9b76-2ae2cef327d2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, have you heard of the SAVE Act? This DANGEROUS bill would require Americans to prove in-person that they’re a citizen. It would stop people from registering to vote by mail or online – which SO many states rely on to register citizens to vote. PLUS, millions of Americans don’t have a passport or a birth certificate matching their legal name which means COUNTLESS American citizens could be disenfranchised under this bill! Just look: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee23e710-ded0-4ee1-96a4-8521cadffc28/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| Peter, voting is a key part of any democracy. We need leaders who will work to EXPAND ballot access, not ones who threaten it. Democrats in Congress are fighting tirelessly against the SAVE Act and other MAGA bills that would threaten our rights and freedoms. But to guarantee Democrats can defeat these bills, we need to make sure they win their upcoming special elections and take control of the House and Senate. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. body:
The Democrat prosecutors want me to feel alone, but what they don’t realize is...
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/gHmfjgABm7zFYr-jdekQtfpWxBEzIKZxg8tdgZzoTSnBas7oxziT5oElZlrxNDb5guU3-HRmN7d1p3eAp8ywe0Ve8xvh6QsA51drPoUPx08j_n8B7qhO-NJPMPnacJZKasKWShzrhNHmVR3gp87cz7DUcnUJpY191knH9rRc4buEQGnsHa2kY3PE99-7xqg_4so4SZoQxzC-wHgL6ThwZD6PZWilWkw8KXK1fOfQ4BGWsf1S_BWuRcdWb1uS-45QH9Pr7BddmW85keBnjs7G-r_7RrvH7AmLq9C1fqh8jk7QUdNH4r3tf-xULnoUdRUTvUWLfa-uSftrxpGq7KpHqDrDdck95XLk7b7v7lKmLJZsSLE3D58n8LM5s85RNen6CwUG___bGueJpI_PbRz63HaNSmOrXLJdfq7oMqM4_ytqFFIvJRWM2LyPhDQnLGhrR0AzgmXnaGelYY3uRELtD70ZwUdX-ycTLliBD0baNBz9A8IG0I0Vpwi8MjPLvQ/tDBmffm2lgHlBfQW8PSFiep2pFEBPsSA/7)
---
Peter,
---
I know I’ve written a lot here, but it’s my hope that you’ll spare just a moment to read all that I have to say, because it’s entirely from the heart.
---
For the better part of my life, there was a time when I read the paper in the morning and saw headlines about me taking down the mob in New York...
---
...About keeping our streets and our citizens safe.
---
_...About successfully defending President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable._
---
**But for the past 12 months now, I’ve been forced to wake up __these__ headlines:**
---
**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_ **
[Source: _MSNBC_]
**“In Delicious Twist, Rudy Giuliani Is at Risk of Losing All His Assets” **
[Source: _The New Republic_]
**“...federal judge in Washington, D.C., threatened [Giuliani] with severe sanctions and possible ‘imprisonment’” **
[Source: _Law & Crime News_]
---
I’ll be frank, I always knew the price I could one day pay for standing by the truth and the side of my dear friend, our 45th and 47th President.
---
You see, no matter how hard they tried, the Left couldn’t stop Donald J. Trump and the America First movement, so they decided to settle for personally, professionally, and financially DESTROYING his former attorney – _yours truly._
---
**__And now, if the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be locked away in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old!__**
---
Make no mistake, these leftist thugs know exactly what they’re plotting. Their case against me involves bogus __state-level__ charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon.
---
And with my case already scheduled to go to trial, the Democrats’ goal is simple but nevertheless sinister. They want me to feel completely **ABANDONED** , completely hopeless, as I prepare to defend myself in what is no doubt the trial of my life.
---
But here’s what the Left will never understand... _America First fighters _NEVER_ _SURRENDER_ , and we _NEVER_ _ABANDON_ our fellow patriots._
---
When I was first wrongfully arrested and booked by the Democrats in one of the most violent jails in America, they filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757.**
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/GKrPPTcdx1CAZqNRNhoQ8K-18Le9go8acz7PEKXn_L1NE8RCex5VrlA75VqyeGtHkOj3ra7eavjGsIQgD__qBxFPHeW4rWMR836d75qigGM1cTaUgZ1VxmUs_hjviuYVvH3aLnHm_w0CnjVD3yWGS2oiirLkh_t5o2EHFQpnh-XKOK6NTxl7cpjIObusOlGLZ93M8wPnVtBDFqTf437O0wgCWptoaFA9UrWlx2Gfe6f-0Bu8fQre9TjluA3yLHjCTub0w1ZOwSRb79_ViyLtHcxmVQON0_-0W1O5lwKggcvWodagGNz4PzhQtJbtDu3iO14kqDFsTCv-IOOtRVxKfBm1zWknS0n_4UyNOp9czhqy22lvIXjdKw7hv67dz-LL9LmrgvoZchYmZdA5BFv3i4kf6KnOCVo6MD5qp-s-AtNDdBGeR0tN1G4opAFuwccFEoCTJjH3ynYZ9UDh5KubVj2D2D1-YZrlGKCDscIe7tgjnFgMbKN5qiTveWIpMg/ine3C0uMp9lqCJEXe-2tacLDKdvu_btb/7)
__
---
They had hoped that on that day I would also feel abandoned and isolated. **_But today, just like on the day I was arrested, I KNOW I’m not alone!_**
---
Which is why I fully intend to give my booking number a whole new meaning – **2,313,757 PATRIOTS** who joined the fight for my freedom and justice!
---

name: New Dems
subject: MAGA Republicans surrender their duties to Trump and Musk!?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
The spending bill that GOP Congressional Republicans passed this week is a slap in the face to hard working Americans, full stop.
Instead of responsibly funding the government and having a plan to fight inflation and lower prices, MAGA Republicans have surrendered their Constitutional duties to Donald Trump and Elon Musk.
MAGA Republicans have given Trump and Musk a blank check to implement their anti-working families Project 2025 agenda – defunding the Department of Education, gutting Social Social Security, and giving tax cuts to billionaires.
Republicans may have forfeited their power to Trump but New Dems have not and we never will. Trump is not king and we’re committed to ensuring it stays that way.
As Trump and Musk try to dismantle our government, we remain focused on flipping the House in 2026 to undercut their dangerous agenda and defend the critical programs working Americans rely on.

That’s what we’re doing, right now. We are absolutely clobbering five Republican members of Congress in their home districts because they’ve abandoned Veterans to suck up to Elon Musk. We’re putting six-figures behind this campaign, because we think it matters. We’ve got to show the people they represent what these MAGA Republicans really think of them.
Oh — and each of them are Veterans themselves. People that should know better and do better. Sellouts and traitors, the lot of them.
Now, how do we keep it up?

**The major takeaway: We are fighting back, and we are _winning_!**

The Trump administration is throwing everything against the wall to see what sticks – all in a brazen attack against our democracy and the rule of law.
But my office, along with those of Democratic attorneys general across this country, refuse to stand by and watch that happen. **And right now, it's up to all of us to stand up and fight back.

[That's why I’m asking you to stand with me as we face the critical battles ahead to protect our economy, our justice system, and our democracy. Will you contribute $5 or more before midnight tonight to help me continue fighting against this assault on our nation by the Trump administration?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104372098/535149061/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1858-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWUxNmJmNi0wMTA4LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YICpEbYQpSX18PpGBe3I4NgMma3JRlXy9rbwsI7IT1A=)**

Whenever a new, unconstitutional executive order is issued, it’s the blue wall of defense – attorneys general across the country – who respond in record time.

**Because we didn’t take an oath to a king. We took an oath to the Constitution, to the rule of law, and to the American people.**
But democracy demands courage, Peter – and so long as that core tenet to this great nation is under attack, each and every one of us needs to have steel in our back and be ready to take a stand.

**My team and I need to raise $5,000 before midnight if I am going to be able to keep fighting as New York's attorney general, ****alongside attorneys general across the country, to**** combat this chaos and confusion. clean_body: The major takeaway: We are fighting back, and we are winning! | | | = Peter, recently, I went on the "MeidasTouch" podcast to talk about the battle we’re facing right now. = The major takeaway: We are fighting back, and we are winning! The Trump administration is throwing everything against the wall to see what sticks – all in a brazen attack against our democracy and the rule of law. But my office, along with those of Democratic attorneys general across this country, refuse to stand by and watch that happen. And right now, it's up to all of us to stand up and fight back. = | | = Whenever a new, unconstitutional executive order is issued, it’s the blue wall of defense – attorneys general across the country – who respond in record time. Because we didn’t take an oath to a king. We took an oath to the Constitution, to the rule of law, and to the American people. But democracy demands courage, Peter – and so long as that core tenet to this great nation is under attack, each and every one of us needs to have steel in our back and be ready to take a stand. My team and I need to raise $5,000 before midnight if I am going to be able to keep fighting as New York's attorney general, alongside attorneys general across the country, to combat this chaos and confusion. I'm counting on your fearless support to reach this goal. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for fighting by my side. – Letitia James | With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families? | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Hey
subject: My name is Pat Harrigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
Our first EOQ deadline is nearly here. We're missing the resources to keep going, and I thought reaching out to you might help.
I'm ready to get to work with President Trump on the America-First agenda!

Patriot,

I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything.**

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=d24b358f897d4c4fac609e0965bceb3e&_e=SrpIrl6F2TUtiBAv55DhbuhO82GKmYw2Vu_x8oy1e8ovI0Srv55-DUT10iMpwE3mPTay7PY3980t2qr7TEokAihyzOZ0_RS79JzjYlLb9yO81GUMVAnZPAjeKHdjTzOJ65FWOxzSZMV07XaApnq9iyRRVCvZFpHa2eOEj3eFa7A0OgGSJxWgLJXY3zCadlIhSldPSlc87POP6N263_wl82hde5V7Vlbo_FVUoMOeVsfmAvOonMG8qSzY-m_cILXkcZABkyyaVwXt25b2TNzG8KR3Bcr3beqLTlDN7VS6qTEuN5_h3x24EeHlEgpyZfgkuJKOjXFaqFrm54CDIYK4mA%3D%3D)

**Here 's a picture of my wife and me at the new member orientation in Washington. **

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=d24b358f897d4c4fac609e0965bceb3e&_e=SrpIrl6F2TUtiBAv55DhbuhO82GKmYw2Vu_x8oy1e8ovI0Srv55-DUT10iMpwE3mPTay7PY3980t2qr7TEokAihyzOZ0_RS79JzjYlLb9yO81GUMVAnZPAjeKHdjTzOJ65FWOxzSZMV07XaApnq9iyRRVCvZFpHa2eOEj3eFa7A0OgGSJxWgLJXY3zCadlIh8mRnZ0yQcEA6h_-J3gdf7uy1G4opMK-LVpDot8KkXmAQ5BHTXnYn5XZu2kk-rN-1ECU4C5bv86r7dE1kWGKR6TJYEMVAx55qWnXniiD26cfqnWb62AfJLinOBZlqG4mSzOlnQMAB0eY3lrgmdCovMA%3D%3D)
Most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls. I'm honored to have just won my race for North Carolina's 10th Congressional District, and I'm ready to work alongside President Trump to make our nation great again. **Here 's a pic of the whole family in D.C. when I had the honor of being sworn into office.****
**
Cleaning up the mess Joe and Kamala left us won 't be easy, but it's a challenge I'm eager to take on. With President Trump in the Oval Office and House and Senate Majorities in Congress, we're more equipped than ever to get our country back on track. The only thing we're missing is the resources to keep going.

**[That's why I'm humbly asking if you'll chip in just a few bucks today.](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=d24b358f897d4c4fac609e0965bceb3e&_e=SrpIrl6F2TUtiBAv55DhbuhO82GKmYw2Vu_x8oy1e8ovI0Srv55-DUT10iMpwE3mPTay7PY3980t2qr7TEokAihyzOZ0_RS79JzjYlLb9yO81GUMVAnZPAjeKHdjTzOJ65FWOxzSZMV07XaApnq9i1tjXC9UGLARFKNJ1HG2lkAZQAOguFzW3H0z1LoN8Dl0Z9flbD98kMm94MneMPk2jUHbofTqisXGtPVNoryGKkkJwEU9reu8luyIptFhfKeKgdTryOftETViLhCTiUrqxLwVVWARpbRFDgI6lPneEKiM4KdWU5AKQwScIJVvc2kEz3yVrJ-WhONNmYNueBOnlUMB9MsTnyPEJ9uTCoBl_BA%3D)**
The talking heads and leftist political know-it-alls say we'll crash and burn before the first 100 days of 2025 are up, and we can't let them be right.

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but making real changes to help hardworking Americans can be tough - **really, really tough.**

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to success we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

---
Under the pretense of "national security," Trump is undermining the First Amendment.
_Why?_ These individuals played key roles in prosecuting Trump for his involvement in the January 6, 2021, insurrection at the U.S. Capitol and his mishandling of classified documents.
As one constitutional scholar put it,**“this is the way dictatorships get going”** and **“people get afraid to say their piece — if they are lawyers, to represent a client who might be in the crosshairs of those in power.”**
Donald Trump and his allies are sending a dangerous message that discrimination and injustice will be tolerated, if not encouraged.
This is just another example of how the administration is targeting those who upheld the rule of law – and why need to be ready for the legal fights ahead.
[**That’s why we’re asking you to make an urgent $20 donation to the DASS Legal Fund today. name: Democrats Win Seats
subject: we’re ready to fight back, but we need your help, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Win Seats PAC
body:
Our mission at DWS PAC is to strategically direct resources to help elect Democrats around the country, and our success depends on support from thousands of donors across the country. | Peter,

Republicans chose chaos by forcing through a funding bill that does nothing for the American people. They’re pandering to Trump and his harmful agenda, which will hurt millions of Americans.

Their plan gives Elon and Trump even more unchecked power to continue their campaign of destruction, including:

— Making it harder for seniors to receive Social Security benefits
— Jeopardizing veterans’ services by attempting to fire 80,000 VA employees
— Cutting rent subsidies for working Americans by more than $700 million
— Cutting $2 billion in funding to keep airports, railways, roads and ports safe

We must take back the House and make sure we have leaders who will fight back against this reckless agenda. We need a government that works for the people, not for the billionaires and political elites.

**[Will you pitch in $10 today to help us elect leaders who will stand up for us? This is the very first end-of-quarter deadline of the year — and we have to show Republicans we will be financially competitive and we’re serious about taking back the House.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104375264/535158259/1297027155?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20250323_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_DWSPAC_NA_NA_MMFR3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGUzOWI1Ny0wYTA4LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JgMGXXU8WPnxUT7JBoso2SqhNI4CQVETBiTj_3wbWuM=)**

name: Charlotte Bergmann
subject: Upcoming Republican News and Meeting Invitations
body:
From Charlotte Bergmann | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a90d1a3f3bd3/republicanmeetingsmarch-5852425?e=9dd54a4530)
---
| | |
---
| |
### Disorder among the Democrats: The opposition struggles to find its way after losing to Trump.
---
| For years Democrats have intimidated Republicans for any outward support of MAGA or conservative values. Now that the tides are turning, continue to protect your community.

[https://www.pbs.org/newshour/politics/democrats-clashed-over-shutdown-strategy-but-partys-crisis-runs-far-deeper](https://ElectBergmann.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4565687fe1f93d61fb32842&id=183f35ae67&e=9dd54a4530)

What began as protests against [Elon Musk](https://ElectBergmann.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4565687fe1f93d61fb32842&id=6ae8e8d9bc&e=9dd54a4530) and his [Department of Government Efficiency](https://ElectBergmann.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4565687fe1f93d61fb32842&id=b47938bc29&e=9dd54a4530) (DOGE) have escalated into violent incidents, including shots fired at a building, destroyed dealership windows and charging stations set on fire. But, their violence is being met with accountability and punishment from a just Department of Justice (DOJ)..

* * *

Peter, the Shelby County Tesla protests held on yesterday, Saturday, 3/22/25, ended peacefully! But, Democrats will not stop their protests. They have a big one scheduled for March 29, 2025, but we are encouraged to not give in to fear! We now have a DOJ that will fight to protect us, as a result of your votes on November 5, 2024, giving President Trump a mandate to **Make America Great Again**.

Peter, Republicans are winning. Democrats' terror is being met with swift arrests!

* * *

[](https://ElectBergmann.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4565687fe1f93d61fb32842&id=0889d0b3f7&e=9dd54a4530)
---
|
---
|
---
| Shelby County, home to Memphis and Tennessee’s largest county, experienced the largest population decline among U.S. counties between 2023 and 2024, the U.S. Census Bureau says.

Shelby County’s population decline is the largest in the U.S. Thus, it shows why leadership matters now more than ever.
---
|
---
| | "I'd rather die on my feet than live on my knees" ~Zapata
---
|
---
| | SAVE THE DATES

Peter, join our upcoming campaign!

subject: 15 years of the Affordable Care Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Today marks the anniversary of the passage of the Affordable Care Act (ACA).
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104376443/535161454/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmRkZWUzYi0wZjA4LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PJZ8kD58tB2AgwDEI0zSz1IkRUBCsoy2vad7svPelbs=&emci=febb3976-af05-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=bbddee3b-0f08-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Today marks the anniversary of the passage of the Affordable Care Act (ACA). Fifteen years later, the ACA continues to save lives, expand coverage, and have a positive impact on those who sign up.** **Enrollment has hit a historic 24 million people covered under health insurance through the Affordable Care Act.** With enrollment reaching a record high and millions of American families relying on the ACA for coverage, it simply does not make sense that the Republican Rip-Off agenda is to cut the funding of Medicaid and Medicare programs that came from this legislation. Rolling back the ACA would not just rip away critical care from the 24 million folks using Marketplace plans — but over 45 million Americans could lose their health insurance provided through other provisions of the ACA — think young adults afforded the option to stay on their parent's plans until age 26, people suffering from pre-existing conditions that could legally be denied care, and more. **Make no mistake, the Republican Rip-Off's plan to cut funding for health care programs from the ACA is nothing more than a ploy to hand a $4.5 trillion tax cut to the richest Americans and wealthiest corporations.** We will not let that stand. I believe that health care is a right. As always, we are going to fight back for Washingtonians and the millions of Americans who benefit from the provisions of the ACA. More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

**Peter, wE HAVE A JAW-DROPPING UPDATE:** | **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104377139/535164118/378635581?refcode=DOTL_20250323_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyOWZkNmExLTEwMDgtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oG7dpqJ4xLvSRK80r9za6gu7y1TaJuFBMVvMUDqFaBw=&emci=80fc06fa-8906-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e29fd6a1-1008-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=14887570)** | **[10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: Demand an investigation into Musk's potential criminal corruption! »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104377140/535164119/378635581?refcode=DOTL_20250323_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyOWZkNmExLTEwMDgtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oG7dpqJ4xLvSRK80r9za6gu7y1TaJuFBMVvMUDqFaBw=&emci=80fc06fa-8906-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e29fd6a1-1008-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=14887570)**
---
Under Donald Trump’s purview, Elon Musk has been terrorizing federal workers, working families, and our very democracy – he has:

**→ Accessed Americans’ PRIVATE & SENSITIVE information
→ FIRED THOUSANDS of federal workers

body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=ZCad4evke+c8umaARNejB2NBLxZeUgvMs1yxqpXudvO17TGV/Au3ygwV9o16Uy/sy6vAgpiMgVUozHspnyWusV1s9BIBDUYDwdNsjooWyi4=]
Headline: 85 Percent of Voters Want Congress to Pass the Equal Rights Amendment [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/ERA_Poll.png]
Fifty years after the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) was initially passed in Congress, an overwhelming majority of likely voters want the provision aimed at guaranteeing equal rights for all genders to go into effect .
Recent polling from Data for Progress finds that 85 percent of likely voters support Congress passing the ERA to give it a second chance at being adopted as a constitutional amendment. Support for the amendment is bipartisan, with 93 percent of Democrats and 79 percent of both independents and Republicans agreeing that the provision should be passed.
We want to hear from voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should we adopt the Equal Rights Amendment to guarantee full & equal protections?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=20.00&contactdata=ZCad4evke+c8umaARNejB2NBLxZeUgvMs1yxqpXudvO17TGV/Au3ygwV9o16Uy/sy6vAgpiMgVUozHspnyWusV1s9BIBDUYDwdNsjooWyi4=] NO [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=20.00&contactdata=ZCad4evke+c8umaARNejB2NBLxZeUgvMs1yxqpXudvO17TGV/Au3ygwV9o16Uy/sy6vAgpiMgVUozHspnyWusV1s9BIBDUYDwdNsjooWyi4=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=ZCad4evke+c8umaARNejB2NBLxZeUgvMs1yxqpXudvO17TGV/Au3ygwV9o16Uy/sy6vAgpiMgVUozHspnyWusV1s9BIBDUYDwdNsjooWyi4=]

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Reader,**It wasn 't long ago that The New York Sun, one of my favorite papers, became the exclusive publisher of my columns. ****In the short time that 's passed, the Sun's mission has become more urgent than ever.****
**
---
[**Join the Sun for 1 ¢ ->**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a7261ae60e264fa6acc48cc33b3f9ce1&_e=-fFTpH4JneBsL-s4P-_xhAKfRr2_hHqcGFDAdjQ4-74Yhc4GGvxOyiaSN3WVLfH1ycJH84cnucKSRZpvOUXZaNRHSV0a6r6Gsz44Wx8JJ6wD2FyP9LCT9Hy6rWYk4MUXKxK2pcFnJIKh2ogroImBx_cPeuGxPeR_XBq8_WSQsSn9oST3JpmGVXXlv_NgVxdSPPO3mUbzKI8YC685vJ7go2Scm7-qIeUCY_G3srAGUMH1k1H0th1HOOVAuZ9XVHvOv9N2lgaCxWR1BBZM0T1ShGySniDuneiNyCrBrssrXyGdKdV_q9G1v9S1gBB7TyqeKbcbG9r3jF-BnnjpWDxP16tDIgbPni1yOoN1tQ8QGdPKqSv5126qszrGeqy8no3XTUm76qCfCbCta69K5AfdqZsCwKDk1rxAtRZgpX8Cw60%3D)
---
It's been obvious to many of us for some time that journalism in our country has become corrupted.

More dangerous than the ideological implication is the fact that we're left with precious few to hold our country's most powerful institutions to account. Our justice system, law enforcement, universities, major corporations and government agencies have become politicized beyond recognition and act with impunity.

The Sun is brave and relentless.Every day it tackles head-on the most important issues facing our country. It truly holds the powerful to account.

It acts as a true newspaper should, in the service of traditional American values and the American people.

The Sun has a long history leading the charge. Its commitment to the finest journalistic standards goes all the way back to its founding in 1833.

The Sun is now growing at a rapid pace, but we're up against some of the world's largest media conglomerates. To win, we need you to join us. Every single person counts.

clean_body: Journalism is broken - here’s who’s fighting back ...it’s needed now more than ever | | | | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW | | Dear Reader,It wasn 't long ago that The New York Sun, one of my favorite papers, became the exclusive publisher of my columns. In the short time that 's passed, the Sun's mission has become more urgent than ever. It's been obvious to many of us for some time that journalism in our country has become corrupted. More dangerous than the ideological implication is the fact that we're left with precious few to hold our country's most powerful institutions to account. Our justice system, law enforcement, universities, major corporations and government agencies have become politicized beyond recognition and act with impunity. The Sun is brave and relentless.Every day it tackles head-on the most important issues facing our country. It truly holds the powerful to account. It acts as a true newspaper should, in the service of traditional American values and the American people. The Sun has a long history leading the charge. Its commitment to the finest journalistic standards goes all the way back to its founding in 1833. The Sun is now growing at a rapid pace, but we're up against some of the world's largest media conglomerates. To win, we need you to join us. Every single person counts. | | | | Join me and the Sun today in the fight to save American journalism. It's more urgent than ever. | | | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | The New York Sun Company, LLC, 300 Park Ave, 2nd Floor, New York, NY 10022, United States ****. ${Gears.unsubscribe\(\})

name: SarahMcBride.com
subject: Coffee break
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
No one knows how essential a good cup of coffee is like Sarah.
#
No one knows how essential a good cup of coffee is like Sarah. For Sarah, it’s Wawa coffee that keeps her going — especially on the long drives from Delaware to D.C.
But you don’t take it from us:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250323-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250323-1836&refcode2=1836_21716_2euaIw&akid=1836%2E21716%2E2euaIw)
That’s why today, we’re asking for a small “coffee break” contribution from you. Just $3 to help us hit our big $110,000 end-of-quarter FEC fundraising goal before March 31st.
[**What do you say? Will you pitch in $3 — or anything you can — right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250323-1?refcode=em20250323-1836&amount=3&refcode2=1836_21716_2euaIw&akid=1836%2E21716%2E2euaIw)
**[Donate $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250323-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250323-1836&refcode2=1836_21716_2euaIw&akid=1836%2E21716%2E2euaIw)**
**[Donate other amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250323-1?refcode=em20250323-1836&refcode2=1836_21716_2euaIw&akid=1836%2E21716%2E2euaIw)**
This is an important moment for our movement.
The next few days will determine our message to Donald Trump and Republicans when our fundraising report becomes public. We want our numbers to show the people are fed up with the lies, theatrics, chaos, and corruption.
That’s why we’re asking for a small contribution — just three bucks, about the cost of a cup of coffee — to help us hit this important goal before March 31st.
[**If you're with us, pitch in $3 to help us stay on track!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250323-1?refcode=em20250323-1836&amount=3&refcode2=1836_21716_2euaIw&akid=1836%2E21716%2E2euaIw)
Thanks!
Team McBride

Nevadans are hurting, friends.
The Bureau of Labor Statistics released new findings: **Nevada remains number one in the nation in unemployment and**** _NV unemployment rates continue to rise._**
Nevadans want to get back to work but Governor Joe Lombardo has done nothing to help and Donald Trump is making it worse.
Trump’s tariff wars would cost Nevada nearly 50,000 jobs, including 66% (!!!!!) of all jobs in Storey County.
Nevada had one of the lowest job growth rates in the nation under Lombardo and our unemployment aid system is broken.
Families are struggling to get by while Lombardo and Republicans side with Trump to gut essential services to give the rich bigger tax cuts.
[_**If Republicans won’t do their jobs, then we have to elect leaders who will. Pitch in before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline to fire Lombardo and Republicans. Let’s elect real leaders who side with Nevada families over the wealthy few.**_](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTbtcn8ul2k_5rrmCv1cLH1A-s4mvbf335n0eizg1v-1jaaxuQIXQOysLxh12QMibUa1mV_7_3fTee9T_C72mL_aDBM7-q46TkglCYB7B9OupqoHMAm27h2Vvt2s7qdIfEFYx4tU3yPoUHGMju4juo3FdNpKjNZkxNkoZwQcjLkRpvY-emaiALVJiggGKYFnAeuXqJOO1Yhl886wRNyl3y-dIF6-XRB_r23QbvJGCs2rxxNrENh0OddNxh_T8E1FuA4Q9D9vUeIiuqBO_ax3fFZtP4qHReamzzxfKrTLMooPMBQvV_1M8vBaOyK5nV3mjxzthDLmiSVDvuyI7wRHPKiEk5325RSytVah4GV1eNMgY/4f1/QOmwuvaDThSaa2CqDakQTA/h1/h001.z0JNumXcdQTIeRrJwYK7sMCIQJ7gDOB8GuBDo9rMPVg)

The Bureau of Labor Statistics released new findings: Nevada remains number one in the nation in unemployment and NV unemployment rates continue to rise. Nevadans want to get back to work but Governor Joe Lombardo has done nothing to help and Donald Trump is making it worse. Trump’s tariff wars would cost Nevada nearly 50,000 jobs, including 66% (!!!!!) of all jobs in Storey County. Nevada had one of the lowest job growth rates in the nation under Lombardo and our unemployment aid system is broken. Families are struggling to get by while Lombardo and Republicans side with Trump to gut essential services to give the rich bigger tax cuts. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | LFG! Hilary The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Kimberly Bretches
subject: The anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge
body:
The George Floyd riots continue to haunt my husband| | | The same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job.
---
| |
---
Dear Peter, That's me and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches in the picture I've sent you...
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=bc1ad1fbe19c4f1e8e21eeb9fe9af702&_e=GWO-G6-M9uOyt2GFdp5y7OzVU_PrSWgOzxUlIvqLSEMpKr1f2VVFMJ0KXLEfEDyrJLXkf1BOwV0unlBFPuA67hXDn6TjMq6HecpVBCxU2vi81XZZUE9calK1s_nQPilkDjwYXgxD3LEoMkw5XSYEDKY-SktnHRXE9SrwfvQiAkTSFo65CgODynzi_eK3uMQn6eu8gNXoXMf4gcFcCF7QkFRe24ThBVzgN6QmiBf0lJJrOINr6yn8gI-L-k05yze4sYP6AC8x8bz7O6R1WDMYvr_cig7dDUim8w92Jl0E7PQ30_W6NGcGJFafckayQTsg5lIlE89FHoI0RzPauQCYQGYhAl77KnO9dVL5Xrroxmng7zg6DW2RupuS_bhBcbv3)
---
...a picture we took on the day Chance received the Lifesaving Medal With Valor for rescuing a driver from a crashed car that had caught on fire. This photo used to be one of my favorites. Now looking at it makes me cry. Because in July, the same city that gave Chance this award... ...will try to lock him up for life for doing his job. I should explain. For nearly 13 years, Chance has been a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department. But in May of 2020, our lives were turned upside down. You probably remember what it was like in our country after George Floyd. Violent, fiery anti-police protests were sweeping through cities. Every step of the way, they were cheered on by radical politicians, Soros-funded prosecutors, and the Mainstream Media who lied to us and said, with a straight face, that these riots were "mostly peaceful." It was especially bad here in Austin, Texas. For three nights in a row, angry, anti-cop mobs rampaged through downtown, smashing windows, burning police cars, and looting stores. The crowd attacked officers like my husband who were trying to keep the peace, pelting them with rocks, bricks, and even lit fireworks. On the third night, things got even worse. Protestors shut down interstate, and a crazed mob surrounded Police Headquarters. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn't restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons – the same "beanbag guns" that police have used for years to break up riots – to stop the violence before it got out of hand. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. What I didn’t know then was that this nightmare wasn't over for us. Far from it. Unknown to Chance and the other officers on duty that night, an anti-police protestor was hit by one of my husband's non-lethal rounds. They claimed they were injured and lost part of their finger. And for that... ...the county prosecutor charged my husband with "aggravated assault by a public servant" -- a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, my emotions went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned that the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don't care if my husband is innocent. They'll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year police veteran. My husband is a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He's served on mission trips -- planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he's done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars and could be his "reward." Even if my husband's good name is cleared there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God's grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us -- the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policemen's best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes -- like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth -- without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they've agreed to help Chance. My friend, you've read my letter this far so I'm going to ask as boldly as I can: Will you help Chance, too? _**[Would you help by sending a one-time gift to LELDF so this amazing group can defend my husband and the other good police officers who have wrongly accused?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=bc1ad1fbe19c4f1e8e21eeb9fe9af702&_e=GWO-G6-M9uOyt2GFdp5y7OzVU_PrSWgOzxUlIvqLSEMpKr1f2VVFMJ0KXLEfEDyrJLXkf1BOwV0unlBFPuA67hXDn6TjMq6HecpVBCxU2vi81XZZUE9calK1s_nQPilkDjwYXgxD3LEoMkw5XSYEDKY-SktnHRXE9SrwfvQiAkTSFo65CgODynzi_eK3uMQn6eu8gNXoXMf4gcFcCF7QkFRe24ThBVzgN6QmiBf0lJKrhvyeqUoItxwFoQ6CaISTpGaVejj6XX-T99tUuiIykA4wqPpTblu6WPLn8KcmfFGD0SK1zXBeivKVF67dygGdvhIIDtfej6G13jSvdNcA4wde4OmYIgJ7FPwDSkEqiDsqipNWslXQpVd0nOVbXvoG)**_** ** You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. _**[So with that in mind, please know that any contribution -- be it $35, $100, $500 or even $1,000 -- is tax-deductible.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=bc1ad1fbe19c4f1e8e21eeb9fe9af702&_e=GWO-G6-M9uOyt2GFdp5y7OzVU_PrSWgOzxUlIvqLSEMpKr1f2VVFMJ0KXLEfEDyrJLXkf1BOwV0unlBFPuA67hXDn6TjMq6HecpVBCxU2vi81XZZUE9calK1s_nQPilkDjwYXgxD3LEoMkw5XSYEDKY-SktnHRXE9SrwfvQiAkTSFo65CgODynzi_eK3uMQn6eu8gNXoXMf4gcFcCF7QkFRe24ThBVzgN6QmiBf0lJK0vZMRgJHgQGS-AlLJJKgSV1fiLHslz-WGdJvP3egAY1Vop_Ae-COtT_lWLGt1m0GHSa_DM9LsWID09k8-v-MSku3xYKZVEEbTXKlcdUjHPvCAxwzzJ0fvOeu69hTrVwZ-8Y9WwaocVn2eIAdtrFJ9)**_ But whatever you feel led to give, please end it back quickly. Chance's trial starts on July 7th. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he'll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won't be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won't be able to walk our daughter down the aisle somebody... I can't bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. _**[So please, my friend, rush back your gift right away if possible.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=bc1ad1fbe19c4f1e8e21eeb9fe9af702&_e=GWO-G6-M9uOyt2GFdp5y7OzVU_PrSWgOzxUlIvqLSEMpKr1f2VVFMJ0KXLEfEDyrJLXkf1BOwV0unlBFPuA67hXDn6TjMq6HecpVBCxU2vi81XZZUE9calK1s_nQPilkDjwYXgxD3LEoMkw5XSYEDKY-SktnHRXE9SrwfvQiAkTSFo65CgODynzi_eK3uMQn6eu8gNXoXMf4gcFcCF7QkFRe24ThBVzgN6QmiBf0lJKMqHhuE71I0I_GD8eMnKvuRrLONJd5DKTkQM_cUbvD1N8XASQ9v9o1S6J0KXQEUue71TWt668BQREx7YDKYNi-qzot0_4ZinhSt-D61RDO1V1VEo-XJsIpyE72ufzGTyzrGCaf4ekvlNAEfYH0x93v)**_ With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, _**[your gift of $35](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=bc1ad1fbe19c4f1e8e21eeb9fe9af702&_e=GWO-G6-M9uOyt2GFdp5y7OzVU_PrSWgOzxUlIvqLSEMpKr1f2VVFMJ0KXLEfEDyrJLXkf1BOwV0unlBFPuA67hXDn6TjMq6HecpVBCxU2vi81XZZUE9calK1s_nQPilkDjwYXgxD3LEoMkw5XSYEDKY-SktnHRXE9SrwfvQiAkTSFo65CgODynzi_eK3uMQn6eu8gNXoXMf4gcFcCF7QkFRe24ThBVzgN6QmiBf0lJJA7mqLZaA2KzIZpDJ06hJRpF0Qf1MOVgqSBP3mtv37IeG_KghP_WWsaD2V3i0vS7Pwn09ahtuxQkDdqmIGHyryB5v_XkCnegy-OX_y6s1fF6l7dnWLaGRc55lrO_4fX_mEEpySzmgRzB1qXsP7Elde)**_ \-- or any amount -- could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. Thank you for reading my email today with such a generous spirit. I can never express how grateful I am to you -- in advance -- for helping my husband fight back.
---
With hope and thanks,
---
Kimberly Bretches
---
P.S. My husband Chance put his life on the line to keep our city safe from a rabid mob of violent protestors. Now life behind bars could be his "reward."And to make things worse, we're up against the deep pockets of a George Soros backed prosecutor in court. We have very little time to act before Chance's trial begins. Chance and I have three children -- and one more on the way. Please don't let them grow up without their father. _**[Thank you for any help you can send to LELDF today.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=bc1ad1fbe19c4f1e8e21eeb9fe9af702&_e=GWO-G6-M9uOyt2GFdp5y7OzVU_PrSWgOzxUlIvqLSEMpKr1f2VVFMJ0KXLEfEDyrJLXkf1BOwV0unlBFPuA67hXDn6TjMq6HecpVBCxU2vi81XZZUE9calK1s_nQPilkDjwYXgxD3LEoMkw5XSYEDKY-SktnHRXE9SrwfvQiAkTSFo65CgODynzi_eK3uMQn6eu8gNXoXMf4gcFcCF7QkFRe24ThBVzgN6QmiBf0lJIbnr52AMkxazZhfU659WFVForkqO6f51GeKv3L9olAQERGjEnaYKRShYHCMs5E3RkMQaPpNnf_OvcA9t3SBkoAUcx3AfbmnKkA7MzhswxPDeyirE4xLPErVPoQ_GIUKD4s3xdj7HY2WrvpflsXJ3vN)**_
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=bc1ad1fbe19c4f1e8e21eeb9fe9af702&_e=GWO-G6-M9uOyt2GFdp5y7OzVU_PrSWgOzxUlIvqLSEMpKr1f2VVFMJ0KXLEfEDyrJLXkf1BOwV0unlBFPuA67hXDn6TjMq6HecpVBCxU2vi81XZZUE9calK1s_nQPilkDjwYXgxD3LEoMkw5XSYEDKY-SktnHRXE9SrwfvQiAkTSFo65CgODynzi_eK3uMQn6eu8gNXoXMf4gcFcCF7QkFRe24ThBVzgN6QmiBf0lJK6xUA3sWQtyoMrff6gOhT_wKcg40UKgu1JVl7rAxIAZFh6bo4ZMnDZjzCyCA6_sSQqWrAWALxJ3yv0pxU90PyPReSXzcRhKYIvtvnnzmEsvrxL4379pr7XFw9jhnNOojp-lPe5PomIO8JTh9rtmWSR)

body:
Will you renew your House GOP Membership for 2025 right away?

|
---
| | | Hi Friend,

It's Speaker Mike Johnson.

I'm contacting you directly about your **House Majority Membership. **
**🚨 As of today, your membership is** _**[inactive](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=09be34005faf4c8da3faf674478529ed&_e=ydDgysAaptC7Zvj1i8Ldl-7964aG9JDViT8RSt9uTYh3Ni-saHIhiAl8v_z7zyZEE-8Sv_xfT-lL3eOZoL557ykPp2_c8BaEe58EAoUlHt3JA6p4l6wHh50fcEp6prCFooY0qbXDfHtOxZq5p-tbj5zeBpDXIU82tci8a_UrSQf3uJ9kVJET5RcWiMrm-y_3Sdq4CXxWInlQpV_7hjIqu2EEZqkARL-KkSK0U8NwdBJj46qh3IKkNpBc3CgZsqWqVowh4QjWURZohh__k0G-OHwH8uPMQmt-aMw6N-5D2Yorb44jeLmBI95pBWvI2ep92da39qUZcA2DD2n2qtMT3nZSTDVkcbPCg0Es_UZz6X1BfW8Ynfrx7_0z35Zzfaec4WGCsv-Tqmhbdl0IOEPMgA%3D%3D "inactive")**_**. 🚨**
**[I need you on the team this year, Friend. We've got a lot of work to get done to save this country and none of it is possible without your help.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=09be34005faf4c8da3faf674478529ed&_e=ydDgysAaptC7Zvj1i8Ldl-7964aG9JDViT8RSt9uTYh3Ni-saHIhiAl8v_z7zyZEE-8Sv_xfT-lL3eOZoL557ykPp2_c8BaEe58EAoUlHt3JA6p4l6wHh50fcEp6prCFooY0qbXDfHtOxZq5p-tbj5zeBpDXIU82tci8a_UrSQf3uJ9kVJET5RcWiMrm-y_3Sdq4CXxWInlQpV_7hjIqu2EEZqkARL-KkSK0U8NwdBJj46qh3IKkNpBc3CgZsqWqTD7UcIfHJ8adHfHPHcDH8EAdY8M28C_zKTBLOeGFiNFUzw6lh8kz14ZLRe0PIAZnop5-gYtGzulwaqnyx9WVy0IPMFQrLACbt0R0TVvbMtXcs1ut8aFTg2tNzAJYSVE2hhQNT6_LnKiXCMjiR_V65Q%3D%3D "I need you on the team this year, Friend. name: Team Spanberger
subject: Glenn Youngkin 2.0
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Their theory is simple: it worked in 2021, so it can work again now. And, frankly, they may be right. But it doesn’t have to be.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104378702/535169574/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-03-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTkwZmY5NjktMTcwOC1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6Nm5U9iNX4RkPFYYAjtRjFxLS45K23U76KUCqMiB-uc=)
---
| Peter,

Do you remember the 2021 election? Do you remember when Republican Glenn Youngkin won and how you felt at that moment?

For months leading up to Election Day, polls showed the race neck-and-neck. It was stressful, and it was tight. Waking up, it felt like every day, a new outside Republican group was pouring in money to flip the Governor’s office red. Republicans across Virginia were united as they mobilized.

_**And they succeeded.**_

Now, we’ve got another Governor’s election here in Virginia this year—and Glenn Youngkin is dusting off his 2021 playbook to help his Lt. Governor, Winsome Earle-Sears, follow in his footsteps. Their theory is simple: it worked in 2021, so it can work again now. And, frankly, they may be right. But it doesn’t have to be.

Here at Abigail Spanberger HQ, we’re doing everything we can to stop him. We’re talking to voters nonstop in every community across the Commonwealth. We’re mobilizing volunteers who believe in Abigail’s vision for Virginia and want to help out. And we’re running a campaign that we’re determined to win—no matter how close the polls are or how much outside money Republicans pour in.

But we need your help to make it happen. clean_body: Their theory is simple: it worked in 2021, so it can work again now. And, frankly, they may be right. But it doesn’t have to be. | = | Peter, Do you remember the 2021 election? Do you remember when Republican Glenn Youngkin won and how you felt at that moment? For months leading up to Election Day, polls showed the race neck-and-neck. It was stressful, and it was tight. Waking up, it felt like every day, a new outside Republican group was pouring in money to flip the Governor’s office red. Republicans across Virginia were united as they mobilized. And they succeeded. Now, we’ve got another Governor’s election here in Virginia this year—and Glenn Youngkin is dusting off his 2021 playbook to help his Lt. Governor, Winsome Earle-Sears, follow in his footsteps. Their theory is simple: it worked in 2021, so it can work again now. And, frankly, they may be right. But it doesn’t have to be. Here at Abigail Spanberger HQ, we’re doing everything we can to stop him. We’re talking to voters nonstop in every community across the Commonwealth. We’re mobilizing volunteers who believe in Abigail’s vision for Virginia and want to help out. And we’re running a campaign that we’re determined to win—no matter how close the polls are or how much outside money Republicans pour in. But we need your help to make it happen. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

Greetings

As a reminder, the Young Democrats of America will gather for an exciting spring meeting from**May****9-11** in **Minneapolis, Minnesota**. This in-person event will bring together young leaders from across the nation for discussions and reflections on how we push forward as a party in this troubling time, hands-on training sessions, important organizational business, and much more. You can find all the information in this email on our website at **[yda.org/ydamsp](yda.org/ydamsp?link_id=1&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-reminder-yda-spring-meeting-in-minneapolis&email_referrer=email_2662969&email_subject=reminder-yda-spring-meeting-in-minneapolis&&)****

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: I’m not saying this to scare you
body:
| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=75a14e6255bf490eaefcb6393fd5a0b4&_e=zSPWvYpbQwM4H_u-ZbMZCg20iFF8SZvh7tdOi7936NF7QT-KvElLIITPYA1ll_Slo3kYUcf0gg2wxt2S3wd0tJvojFfQLoc15HiQNM5viuvtQOOnf2p2kWr2vEICPUOgiyPn-1R8VtoqN12_pOVdokKn82r68XgWZQcMv0uP8zMuY7NihbS5vZ0IoNqVXpkB4j6d2kVAVDUBOHxi6HYnfTMma1LQRTexOpvTvjr6TdoUExWIvVolL643siNX1qVpIPkh9ly6nYY84K22PtweIQTP5s7QyUChSgUDNRG_3tuWKhJw_TjXgynFlCT51jtHmVvPOe5wKN2Pzrmf4ZJtE5d-rggIy_81Q2i2zdSDXQ34EbmsEok7EdprKVrxkOKqYHL9JXbq0WWf1WGRuqJvhNySYsprWU18CWtUpuXmuT4%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=75a14e6255bf490eaefcb6393fd5a0b4&_e=zSPWvYpbQwM4H_u-ZbMZCg20iFF8SZvh7tdOi7936NF7QT-KvElLIITPYA1ll_Slo3kYUcf0gg2wxt2S3wd0tJvojFfQLoc15HiQNM5viuvtQOOnf2p2kWr2vEICPUOgiyPn-1R8VtoqN12_pOVdokKn82r68XgWZQcMv0uP8zMuY7NihbS5vZ0IoNqVXpkB4j6d2kVAVDUBOHxi6HYnfTMma1LQRTexOpvTvjr6TdoUExWIvVolL643siNX1qVpIPkh9ly6nYY84K22PtweISHzU-ePdRsApEi0yiLP0ug_gvBzRhpWmVdRp4ZG7Tuy6zMlVDT9I4WrWU6RoO8mfLNn6aR4xUuGmB_rSmF8IwI3PbjKGOGU7PZ88KZD2p5-O-NE4bbNBeldc33S10_FvpEsdamx0aq-d-nZqhG44Dk%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=75a14e6255bf490eaefcb6393fd5a0b4&_e=zSPWvYpbQwM4H_u-ZbMZCg20iFF8SZvh7tdOi7936NF7QT-KvElLIITPYA1ll_Slo3kYUcf0gg2wxt2S3wd0tJvojFfQLoc15HiQNM5viuvtQOOnf2p2kWr2vEICPUOgiyPn-1R8VtoqN12_pOVdokKn82r68XgWZQcMv0uP8zMuY7NihbS5vZ0IoNqVXpkB4j6d2kVAVDUBOHxi6HYnfTMma1LQRTexOpvTvjr6TdoUExWIvVolL643siNX1qVpIPkh9ly6nYY84K22PtweIfTf89Jn0hmpdGNX7xu3BCW-zKdtSDgFrOkCVMdU96onD0OVGixyvxnmfao56p9m0Sk6yllJ-LK8LH6wFyS41f5Rn7IvwRnXpJMJzw2hSzh4qEtQMhJPdQ8YI8vhtpBeIVsJa7LXRZN5NP0WSbcIMYs%3D)**

So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | www.HorowitzFreedomCenter.orgP.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499 | |

name: Randy Fine (Special Election)
subject: FL-6 Special Election Alert
body:
Democrats have spent $10 MILLION to defeat me in FL-6

| | | | |
---
Fellow patriot,
Hi it’s Randy Fine, the GOP Nominee in the FL-6 Special Election for Congress.
Before I tell you a little bit about myself, you need to know that I’m in the political fight of my life. **_[Democrats have spent over $10 MILLION to defeat me in my special election and take control in Congress](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/adbv/?__vbtrk=MjgxNDUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgxNDUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
It is a massive amount of money and they are smearing the good name I’ve spent my life building in a shocking political hatchet job.
Liberal online donors are sending in massive waves of cash to my Democrat opponent on a daily basis, and it is critically important we keep up. __**[If you can help, I truly need your support](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/adbv/?__vbtrk=MjgxNDUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgxNDUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__ _**.**_
Your donation will help me go to Congress with this resume:

* I was the first elected Republican in Florida to endorse President Trump for president in his 2024 campaign, and he’s endorsed me in this race.
* I went to Harvard University for undergrad and business school... before it went woke!
* My nickname is the Hebrew Hammer, and when I get to Congress the antisemitic squad is going to be in trouble.

I truly appreciate your support, we must win this race to keep President Trump’s agenda on track.
**_[If you’re able, a donation of any amount would mean so much. Every little bit helps](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/adbv/?__vbtrk=MjgxNDUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgxNDUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

_Humbly,_

**Randy Fine** FL-6 Republican Nominee
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/adbv/?__vbtrk=MjgxNDUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgxNDUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=281452&trkid=638513582&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: NEW REPORT: MAGA Media Is Dominating—We Need All Hands On Deck To Push Back
body:
A new study shows right wing extremist content dominating corporate and social media and destroying our republic -- here's how we must respond

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..I_K1v8CCVue5-7Ca8MJWmj_AJqVsEmX5W9p4Q8Mijxg?) for more
---
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucWFzaW1yYXNoaWQuY29tL3AvdGhlLWxlZnQtaXMtbG9zaW5nLXRoZS1tZXNzYWdpbmc_.nsYzGlPd7Es0Eqhfu03Cw4pKxQ4rg168pxrVCBcgkzY?)
---
Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription!
* * *
# [NEW REPORT: MAGA Media Is Dominating--We Need All Hands On Deck To Push Back](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=159689062&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU5Njg5MDYyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDI3NTg2MDYsImV4cCI6MTc0NTM1MDYwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.j6LlC4ALEaIlzgFHRAg5eoBFCCSD0KpdBmuWuWP-E7E)
### A new study shows right wing extremist content dominating corporate and social media and destroying our republic -- here's how we must respond
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Mar 23
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=159689062&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU5Njg5MDYyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0Mjc1ODYwNiwiZXhwIjoxNzQ1MzUwNjA2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.S6iGFfA1KGiX_49oNcqHJKZx3xCVd94psurMEAAye5M&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=159689062&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU5Njg5MDYyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDI3NTg2MDYsImV4cCI6MTc0NTM1MDYwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.j6LlC4ALEaIlzgFHRAg5eoBFCCSD0KpdBmuWuWP-E7E&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=159689062&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU5Njg5MDYyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDI3NTg2MDYsImV4cCI6MTc0NTM1MDYwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.j6LlC4ALEaIlzgFHRAg5eoBFCCSD0KpdBmuWuWP-E7E)
---
| | [](https://substack..iRYE8jnzXslxIj8RqWpStkCx3ozW5CSSc_bo-ZSla1o?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/the-left-is-losing-the-messaging?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

The below three charts are devastating.
Devastating for those who want factually accurate information from our media. We already knew that the LA Times, Wall Street Journal, The Washington Post, NY Post, Fox News, Meta, Twitter-- and more -- are owned by pro Trump billionaires. But unfortunately, this is just the tip of the ice berg. Right wing content creators dominate social media as well, and it has transformed our nation into a right wing regime that mimics Russia, China, and other anti-democratic States. We must collectively activate to stop this right wing spiral, or we will cross a point of no return. **Let 's Address This.**
**I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. Subscribe and join more than 123,000 fellow activists.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..6fEvWi0Ms6T5dP6FuhNQP1iSGDqhy1tYI1NpOaHvvJE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=159689062)
## Right Wing Media Dominates
Earlier this month, a watchdog organization called Media Matters for America released [a devastating report on the state of online media](https://substack.com/redirect/77545145-627d-4dbf-a5c5-276961258396?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). As the below graphic illustrates, right wing voices, conspiracy theorists, and MAGA extremists dominate the social media landscape--far dwarfing left leaning creators and voices.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6e9d4df5-a226-460a-b2ec-87be8aab8808?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This is particularly concerning because studies show that young people are on social media more than any other demographic, and more than half receive their news from social media. It is no wonder, therefore, that from the 2020 election the 2024 election, we saw a [shocking 11 point shift to the right for young people 18-29](https://substack.com/redirect/39c9690a-fcd5-4cd4-a618-bef2c8a40e85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and a 23 point increase among the same demographic in Trump's approval rating. The MAGA marketing strategy went full speed to reach the youth, and it paid off immensely.
Sadly, the left has not yet caught on, and is still not making the necessary investments to recapture the narrative or market on young people. This is where you, the reader, can have the biggest influence. Subscribe to left leaning content creators who are committed to justice and human rights. Every dollar we spend is a reflection of the future we want to create for ourselves and for our next generation. Right now, right wing MAGA content heavily dominates that future--and sadly, it's getting worse.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..6fEvWi0Ms6T5dP6FuhNQP1iSGDqhy1tYI1NpOaHvvJE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=159689062)
## Right Wing Media Enables Right Wing Politics
It's getting worse because it isn't just media. The right wing media shift has also enabled a massive right wing shift of the United States into a far right regime. Consider the below two charges by Financial Times and their analysis of the World Values Survey.
The first chart demonstrates that the USA right now is closer to Russia than it is to the west on many of its values. It is as illiberal as Russia or Turkey, and nearly as isolationist as China, Russia, and Turkey.
None of this is healthy or sustainable for our republic.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fe578886-c3cc-446c-be59-d8cb8b620fe0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The next Financial Times chart shows how under the Trump regime, the United States has completely broken away from liberal democratic republics. It now instead mimicks the authoritarian regime of Russia. We must recognize that the aforementioned right wing narratives and these right wing politics are intimately connected.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6dd7a6dd-257e-4f7a-b0d1-6e3705b905c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
That is, right wing legacy and social media normalizes fascist ideology, the man in the White House enacts that ideology, and right wing legacy and social media then further popularizes and normalizes it. This is major reason why--despite the majority of Americans supporting healthcare as a human right--we face a for profit exploitative health insurance system, and the real possibility of a gutted Medicaid and Medicare. It's why--despite the majority of Americans supporting abortion access, climate justice, a living wage, taxing the wealthy, and diversity in the public sphere--the Trump regime is successfully dismantling or repealing each of them, one by one. It's why--despite the majority of Americans supporting USPS--the Trump regime is gutting it.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..6fEvWi0Ms6T5dP6FuhNQP1iSGDqhy1tYI1NpOaHvvJE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=159689062)
## How Do We Combat This?
If we're serious about pushing back against the domination of right-wing media, then we need to get serious about building and sustaining left-leaning creators who center justice, truth, and human dignity. I write daily on human rights issues corporate media won't touch--not behind a paywall, but accessible to all. You can [subscribe for free, or for $6/month](https://substack.com/redirect/bd269a35-8bf0-49f2-be3d-7f2ffe089043?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) if you're able. I'm deeply grateful for your trust and support.
To repeat--none of my content is behind a paywall. I don't believe in requiring readers to pay for access. I ask you to become a paid subscriber _if and only if_ it is in your budget. Please know that I cherish free subscribers all the same because you help grow the platform and share the human rights content I research and publish.
I also urge you to [explore and invest in the dozens of other thought leaders and activists I recommend](https://substack.com/redirect/23c63554-7bff-477c-985b-a6e012164175?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--each one fighting to ensure truth has a voice. Remember: the far-right didn't build its media empire overnight. It took years of strategy, funding, and community-building. We likewise cannot flip that overnight, but we can start now--and do it the right way. Our ideas win when people hear them. But to make that happen, we must build the infrastructure so they _can_ hear them. [Subscribe today](https://substack.com/redirect/bd269a35-8bf0-49f2-be3d-7f2ffe089043?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). If you're already subscribed, share this content or gift a subscription to someone you love.
Hope is not lost. We can overcome this--with truth, with justice, and with each other.
Let's get to work.
**I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism under this new administration. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..6fEvWi0Ms6T5dP6FuhNQP1iSGDqhy1tYI1NpOaHvvJE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=159689062)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fb152854-7f13-476d-989f-f1be7279799c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Quick Ask!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.**Become a paid subscriber and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..6fEvWi0Ms6T5dP6FuhNQP1iSGDqhy1tYI1NpOaHvvJE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=159689062)

---
| | [Comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=159689062&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU5Njg5MDYyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDI3NTg2MDYsImV4cCI6MTc0NTM1MDYwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.j6LlC4ALEaIlzgFHRAg5eoBFCCSD0KpdBmuWuWP-E7E&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
