If we're serious about pushing back against the domination of right-wing media, then we need to get serious about building and sustaining left-leaning creators who center justice, truth, and human dignity. I write daily on human rights issues corporate media won't touch--not behind a paywall, but accessible to all. You can if you're able. I'm deeply grateful for your trust and support. To repeat--none of my content is behind a paywall. I don't believe in requiring readers to pay for access. I ask you to become a paid subscriber if and only if it is in your budget. Please know that I cherish free subscribers all the same because you help grow the platform and share the human rights content I research and publish. I also urge you to one fighting to ensure truth has a voice. Remember: the far-right didn't build its media empire overnight. It took years of strategy, funding, and community-building. We likewise cannot flip that overnight, but we can start now--and do it the right way. Our ideas win when people hear them. But to make that happen, we must build the infrastructure so they can hear them. . If you're already subscribed, share this content or gift a subscription to someone you love. Hope is not lost. We can overcome this--with truth, with justice, and with each other. Let's get to work. I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism under this new administration. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement. | | ---|---|--- Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement.** | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

name: Nellie Pou
subject: DOGE cuts hit us at home in NJ-09
body:
I will vigorously oppose the sale of the Roe Building

| |
---
Hi friend, DOGE is catapulting our government into chaos and one target is the Roe Federal Building right in downtown Paterson. In a hearing earlier this month, I said that the proposed sale was nonsensical and that I'd oppose it vigorously. This building is one of 440 on a target list from the Trump administration. Importantly, the building houses popular offices for the IRS and Social Security Administration. Closing it hurts seniors needing support for their social security payouts and impacts vital public services. **Closing it doesn't save anyone money, all it does is hurt New Jerseyans.** I am fighting each day against the chaos that the Trump administration is causing in government. They say that they are dismantling our government to bring efficiency, but what that actually means is that they're reconfiguring our government for their benefit. We will not let that happen. Team, you've heard us say it before but it bears repeating: Elon Musk, Mike Johnson, and the NRCC are coming after us. They're going to pour millions of dollars into flipping this seat. They have billionaires, we have the people. **[Please, whatever you're able to contribute today will help us out immensely as we build out the team.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104380035/535173289/-200729754?amp;refcode=250323_tp_federal_l1&ms=250323_tp_federal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTdlOWY1MWQtMWEwOC1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Rp_X3FHY3o8GU0oxROpl_nngxhNgn3e6QeJiTeqfCyE=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104380042/535173296/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=250323_tp_federal&ms=250323_tp_federal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTdlOWY1MWQtMWEwOC1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Rp_X3FHY3o8GU0oxROpl_nngxhNgn3e6QeJiTeqfCyE=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104380043/535173297/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=250323_tp_federal&ms=250323_tp_federal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTdlOWY1MWQtMWEwOC1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Rp_X3FHY3o8GU0oxROpl_nngxhNgn3e6QeJiTeqfCyE=)

name: Dr. Maxine Dexter, M.D
subject: Keep showing up and showing out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Hi Peter,
The first fifty days of the Trump Administration reminded us of who he is and, more importantly, what we’re made of.
Trump, his billionaire bully Elon Musk, and his sycophants in Congress are steamrolling what makes our country free—and our foreign allies, federal workers, and children’s futures are the collateral damage.
These decisions underscore just how important it is to strengthen our resolve. If we want to push back against Trump’s agenda, we need to rebuild our movement today—not months or years from now.
I’m fighting to be a voice for Oregon families and progressive ideals in Congress. Will you support me by chipping in today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q1?refcode=X_250323_KeepShowingUp_act]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q1?refcode=X_250323_KeepShowingUp_act]
We all know this administration isn’t interested in protecting our families or lowering the cost of living. If they were, they’d be fighting to pass universal healthcare, build affordable housing, protect our voting and reproductive rights, and address climate change.
Instead, they’re firing our veterans, intimidating people across the country, and starting trade wars while cutting taxes for the ultra-rich—it’s corrupt and it’s dangerous.
I’m ready to hold this administration accountable and defend our values by fighting for people to be able to rely on the government and expect real access to opportunity. Housing, healthcare, and transportation must be affordable and accessible to anyone who works hard and plays by the rules. Billionaires aren’t who I work for—I work for you.
We rely on grassroots donors—not billionaires. Can you support our campaign by chipping in what you can today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q1?refcode=X_250323_KeepShowingUp_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q1?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=X_250323_KeepShowingUp_act] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q1?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=X_250323_KeepShowingUp_act]

DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q1?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=X_250323_KeepShowingUp_act] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q1?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_250323_KeepShowingUp_act]
Thank you for showing up and showing out for your fellow Americans, for our vulnerable communities who are in Trump’s line of fire, and for demanding that your Reps hear you.
Relentlessly,
Maxine
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q1?refcode=X_250323_KeepShowingUp_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q1?refcode=X_250323_KeepShowingUp_act] Maxine Dexter is a critical care physician with decades of experience using facts and following science to help her patients.
Now she's using those skills in Congress to ensure healthy communities by standing up to Big Pharma, fighting climate change, and expanding reproductive rights, as well as rebuilding a fair economy for all by protecting Social Security and Medicare.
To learn more about Maxine, visit MaxineForOregon.com [https://maxinefororegon.com/] .

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: On authoritarianism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Shot PAC
body:
MAGA is committed to eliminating Democratic seats in Congress so Trump can continue his “revolution” without domestic opposition. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104380272/535174092/-1346133780?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250323_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzcwMjgxYi0xYjA4LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0-RcLeLnPNPPk8jdGZXEh1Q7R5lH991B45ZOnV0fBWA=)
---
_Our new reality_ — From classrooms to boardrooms to local governments and the press, Americans now fear political retribution from their own government. Think of the CEO who bends the knee after public threats of prosecution. Or the newspaper owner who decides it’s safer to bury editorial criticism of the President. The President and his lieutenants relish the power of intimidation. _And they’re using it_. *** Before my election to represent Georgia in the U.S. Senate, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminds me of countries where dissent is silenced by intimidation. _“We don’t want any trouble.” “We’re not sticking our necks out right now.” “We don’t need an investigation.”_ **These things should never be said in the United States.** *** Peter: Only by regaining Congressional power can we reverse this. Remember: in 2026, I’m the only Democratic U.S. Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won. MAGA needs me defeated and gone. _Help me defeat them in a landslide. Help fight back._ **[Please split $10 between my campaign and Fair Shot today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104380274/535174094/1914362953?amount=10&refcode=AU_FSP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250323_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzcwMjgxYi0xYjA4LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0-RcLeLnPNPPk8jdGZXEh1Q7R5lH991B45ZOnV0fBWA=)** With gratitude, Senator Jon Ossoff

| | | Peter, the Florida Special Elections are a few days away.

Our America First MAGA candidates – _Randy Fine and Jimmy Patronis_ – are ready for the fight of their lives.

**But they won’t be able to win this on their own.**

The Democrats are DESPERATE to win these elections and have made it clear that they are willing to throw everything and the kitchen sink at these races because they know what it means:

**They could take control of the House and have the power to completely dismantle President Trump's Agenda. **

[**That’s why we’re begging you to step up and help us in this fight to save our House Majority.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._bW9uZXlfcGxlZGdlPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDMyM19ZVS1CVC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MTczNTItMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAzMjNfWVUtQlQuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjE3MzUyLTI4OTkifQ/-vFtnr13XtyrgFSKJ7yRjA)

name: Urgent FL-06 Update
subject: We won’t survive if things don’t turn around - quickly
body:
We’re going all in and spending money that we don’t yet have, in the hopes that our supporters from all over the country will understand the predicament we’re in and rush to help keep us afloat.
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VUjuWpTnBdGTftR4mQdik2KF1BmCRrjofkU_X9PnbSHYqbvIB1NZpN4KCteTXXvhohz0EKk6PPGGBUb5bNur6uvj1zKEjr6qo74ZWyr465mbxlqUgVAeP9FrUflaVokBUV9HEz1rNlsF154piq67f9peQ_CZ6d3Qbw4oiE2gHdY7J4RJhzvgOfnXopx5apfSbeL-Ikp_EbJHxBTZb8c0I_ltvpNUIpWP&c=4yKaUr1M9h0YfUadDCRYGuEuMozUAZrlD36q46GPgO49ipPjBXKvRw==&ch=vhjP45DBrlg7EUt3TGqZ-rvuFyxCAe1sEbNLws2Kfv0kFPmx6C-SqQ==)
---
Team,
We believe in being honest with the folks who support us, and so we need to come to you now and say it straight up: we're in a bit of a bind, and I'm not sure we can make it out.
Because ActBlue doesn't disburse funds over the weekend, our cash on hand does not reflect all that we've raised from Friday to today. But we are running out of time, and we simply cannot wait until Monday to buy precious TV air time and to pay our canvassers who are working double shifts reaching out to persuadable voters.
So, we have to do something risky: We're going all in and spending money that we don't yet have, in the hopes that our supporters from all over the country will understand the predicament we're in and rush to help keep us afloat. There's just no other option.
Tomorrow morning, we need to see an incredible influx of donations that came in over the weekend. If we don't hit our goals and pull in enough donations to cover our ad buys and payroll for our door to door canvassers, we could be in serious trouble.
---
| | | | [Will you step in and take immediate action to help us avoid catastrophe nearly one week out from Election Day? MAGA is just waiting to pounce on any mistake we make--if they sense weakness, we could lose all the momentum we've worked so hard to get. Right-wing legislators know that Trump and Musk’s agenda is an extremely unpopular one — that’s exactly why they’re hiding from constituents.
They’re firing veterans and non-partisan civil servants who have served this country for decades.
They’re planning to cut billions of dollars from Medicare, Medicaid, Social Security, SNAP, and so many other social safety net programs just to hand out tax breaks to their billionaire donors.
And they’re standing by silently while Donald Trump threatens to shred the Constitution, disrupt the balance of powers, and allow an unelected billionaire to reign freely through government agencies.
_**[Yassamin is committed to staying engaged with Arizonans and fighting for working families. Will you pitch in now to help us reach every corner of the Third District?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104380459/535174547/1386712341?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250323_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTMwMmI4OC0xYjA4LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ZjWGdsN_DKkhs-p6Jm7HxXLUlsadsi7eyAthzzm8QA=)**_

And they’re standing by silently while Donald Trump threatens to shred the Constitution, disrupt the balance of powers, and allow an unelected billionaire to reign freely through government agencies. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support today, Team Yass Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

name: Florida GOP HQ
subject: We desperately need your help on this!

body:
We don’t mean to sound alarming, but this is a serious situation...We are just a matter of days away from two critical congressional special elections in Florida, and our special election funding is running out. |
---
**EMERGENCY SPECIAL
ELECTION FUND:

** **CRITICALLY LOW 🪫**

Fellow American,

We don't mean to sound alarming, but this situation is serious. We are just a matter of days away from two critical congressional special elections in Florida, and our special election funding is running out. **We desperately need this funding to get out the vote in these key districts!**

Our state, our country, and President Trump are counting on us to get out the vote and ensure these two seats remain in Republican's hands.

Every vote matters, and we cannot afford to fall short now. The stakes couldn't be higher, and if we lose these elections, it will have a ripple effect across the nation.

[**Please, will you make an immediate donation of $20.25 --or any amount you can--right now to help refuel the 2025 Emergency Special Election Fund?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6dc8218723494dbabbe51f891de9af5a&_e=-uZ7Dr0YyhBzQTwgvXhl9MagMvTszlLM07LnyY8hu63-nj0ysKQHwSr_AOQf7YeC8qXwrcLbdRnXmtEYZ-VzYcuUNIWrassKzRSiittcHyD6FH9Wj4i7hFbFD9ATfJ3fv-GWuS80G8kYsYG2igqLzu3qbu7soAUiimJcyK8HuvhLJ3L0vTDB_grtJ6Yl1UWBY0GpgsD5Dk2dnO5B6lpT2AsROHZQWHgn4mktC53OtQfZ3Hbgw8vDPFrh9tuyNMStkQhf9R0Wf_pgV_yhNzCTr3fa0S8dFxFvXCbyQS5_oQDENC7UGZHxl60ObV5G_uYsMF13u4P5Y10lbkWAOTAyJBimCevkPVmEIvYP9O2LPDHGuA-ARq0RDNJ-1XEvdX5qoQAswAWMLWLg-t-cZpqOdmhWN2kKrRvsuwxR56McNUA%3D)

name: Mark Pukita, GFI
subject: 🆘 OHIO Ballot Issue ALERT & MORE!
body:
🆘 Important details on the upcoming ballot issue! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=51aac7e375&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
**PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT!**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=8bf681c789&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | | ** **
**CALL TO ACTION!
SPREAD THE WORD!
$2.5B BOND ISSUE ON
OHIO'S MAY PRIMARY BALLOT!
WHAT EVERYONE NEEDS TO KNOW!
WE MUST GET THE WORD OUT!**

---
| [**NEW**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f1a61aaab7&e=5c740fa3e2)[**WEBPAGE FOR YOU TO BOOKMARK WITH RESOURCES TO HELP US ALL FIGHT ISSUE 2!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0e84ba8393&e=5c740fa3e2)

We [**PREVIOUSLY**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b11735cc30&e=5c740fa3e2) made you aware there's a bond issue on the Ohio primary election ballot in May. Now we must make sure others are aware! **EARLY VOTING STARTS APRIL 8TH!**

**HERE'S WHAT YOU CAN DO TO HELP!**

1) PLEASE **forward this message** to as many people as you can, especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
2) PLEASE download **[THIS GRAPHIC](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=ccfe46f728&e=5c740fa3e2) (same as below)** to your phone & send it to everyone you can, again, **especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
NEW >>>> 3)****** PLEASE **refer** as many people as you can **to the new Issue 2[WEBPAGE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9d316510c0&e=5c740fa3e2)**!

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c7cf664067&e=5c740fa3e2)
**(Click the image above to download!)
BACKGROUND ON THIS BOND ISSUE**
It's for $2.5B dollars with spending limits of $250,000,000 annually. Supposedly, it's necessary for the health and well-being of Ohio's infrastructure. We'll bet most Ohioans haven't heard about it and know almost nothing about it. That's intentional. It's taxpayer abuse. A great strategy might be to vote NO on it. Here's why in a short video. Once you've watched it, please SHARE it with everyone you can!
Thank you!

**EPISODE: "Ohio's Stealthy May Bond Issue"**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b0dc220547&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
| | ** **
**PARTICIPATE IN HELPING A WONDERFUL
CAUSE AND MAYBE WIN A
ONCE-IN-A-LIFETIME TRIP FOR TWO (2)!**

---
| Our good friend [**Bob Frantz**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0facd43c03&e=5c740fa3e2) of [**"Strictly Speaking"**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=65db0bb6f9&e=5c740fa3e2) and [**Salem Radio**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=bb137fecc4&e=5c740fa3e2) has asked us to help him promote a great cause, a raffle for a veteran's foundation called "**The Travis Mills Foundation** ". Only 500 tickets are being sold & they are $100 each. The Grand Prize is a trip for 2 to Normandy Beach as part of a French tour that Bob is hosting. All proceeds, $50,000, goes to the **Travis Mills Foundation**.
If you don’t win, it’s still a donation to a great cause!

[Click **HERE** for the Purchase Link](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0fd0661efb&e=5c740fa3e2)

Thank you!

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=cfdd02f5b1&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
| |
**GFI WEBSITE IMPROVEMENTS:
A "WORK IN PROGRESS"
BUT COMING ALONG NICELY!**

---
|
We announced a few months ago that we were planning for some **website improvements**. They are finally being rolled out. If you go to the GFI website, you may notice:
* New **streamlined menus** with drop-downs.
* A **pop-up capability** for urgent & important information. Today it's being used to allow visitors to sign up for our text alerts & this newsletter with one click.
* **Videos** embedded on our home page.
* An [**Ohio Events Calendar**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b20e391db6&e=5c740fa3e2).

This is just the start. Please let us know what you think by visiting [**GFIOhio.com**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=edc1fadcf6&e=5c740fa3e2) today!

**Thank you!**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=2f9e03f3bd&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|
[**CLICK HERE for access to all past issues!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=3c4038c9e8&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)
[GFIOhio.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=722f6fb5c7&e=5c740fa3e2)**
---
| | _Copyright © 2025 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=0f57b36cf4) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&t=b&e=5c740fa3e2&c=0f57b36cf4).

name: Carolina, United We Dream
subject: Sign Now: Congress must invest in people, not kidnappings!
body:
Congress passed a spending bill that puts our communities LAST. | | | Peter, **🚨Last week, Congress passed a temporary spending bill that includes $485 million to fast-track Trump’s plans to abduct, disappear, and deport our immigrant neighbors**. All this while cutting billions from crucial resources for our community, including healthcare, public health, education, environmental protections, and infrastructure. We cannot allow Congress to continue giving Trump and his billionaire allies a blank check to kidnap immigrants from our communities and tear our families apart. Can you take action today to demand Congress invest in working-class communities — not Trump, ICE, CBP, and all who try to tear our families apart? **Add your name to our petition to demand your members of Congress reject funding for Trump’s mass deportation plans.** **[✍️ SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_mKAE84t-uAVI28WQmzg4gH6DuLRyBehrgHN0Au0PQDstVIl8ECvcEa4AVdp4hU3kNNpkBYFrMIIFZahzKCVNjqE5Ll0WUF90xAqSptm6OqhPvnDUK6NfyEZt9UOEK8uxRrKVC7eCCkI0YRiJz7vfZzSboqeUunsSXR1h6caDrrG5TCDfTWAtVv4jgfjDLFeTIKMOxwiIX_kc3pb3AIJsqUyWJHfBPXT6YqHS2S0Jwvy3f-J_AWVfIESg4yqeCl37gDWxIx6baA2I6wfQSYO403KTy0PZSHR8xmtxx5xq3zPfaD4GNYdSlSor6rEVc93y5lAGjqsCA8IOIlEXdaux-/4f1/IXsGvDkdRt-sBicOsf4G4A/h0/h001.Z5jROEAl6Psv7wHvzGY8XWNQ4m7yoPGgeABJ4hl9wrk)** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_mKAE84t-uAVI28WQmzg4gH6DuLRyBehrgHN0Au0PQDstVIl8ECvcEa4AVdp4hU3kNNpkBYFrMIIFZahzKCVNjqE5Ll0WUF90xAqSptm6OqhPvnDUK6NfyEZt9UOEK8uyN_w1xdqgc24JyUiIpB2rLBwpPAeh2aAEmBY9ZUzBNZmethxS4RS5UsvSamJKQSXqZRj6jU5nRtjwUviNoarAO0JOtMuxPpY-GTIJNenc-JRIH7sA4peAHEnWpjxGfMWFTVafpQKcBg1IcN2gGZX9HMol4pNLBFi6t0jYueqhb3TuaseqGuzuxuwS-YeP03lBnq96KHUnZpv0gLsHpHkdk/4f1/IXsGvDkdRt-sBicOsf4G4A/h1/h001.-Q0oL67CZ7l_WjHBzZ4k4Q_jrFlOvgXE401P5g4brt4)
It’s time for Congress to stop putting policing, state-sanctioned abductions, and border militarization above the well-being of our communities! With millions of Americans struggling to make ends meet, Congress should prioritize funding for education, healthcare, and food assistance programs instead of giving Trump even more power to kidnap and deport the people we love! clean_body: Congress passed a spending bill that puts our communities LAST. | | | Peter, 🚨Last week, Congress passed a temporary spending bill that includes $485 million to fast-track Trump’s plans to abduct, disappear, and deport our immigrant neighbors. All this while cutting billions from crucial resources for our community, including healthcare, public health, education, environmental protections, and infrastructure. We cannot allow Congress to continue giving Trump and his billionaire allies a blank check to kidnap immigrants from our communities and tear our families apart. Can you take action today to demand Congress invest in working-class communities — not Trump, ICE, CBP, and all who try to tear our families apart? Add your name to our petition to demand your members of Congress reject funding for Trump’s mass deportation plans. It’s time for Congress to stop putting policing, state-sanctioned abductions, and border militarization above the well-being of our communities! With millions of Americans struggling to make ends meet, Congress should prioritize funding for education, healthcare, and food assistance programs instead of giving Trump even more power to kidnap and deport the people we love! Demand your money gets invested in our schools, parks, hospitals, and housing. ⏰ In solidarity, Carolina and the United We Dream team | Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Team Crow
subject: Trump’s deal with Putin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

This past Tuesday, Donald Trump spoke with Vladimir Putin.

Their conversation centered around a so-called “energy and infrastructure ceasefire” for Ukraine, with vague promises of peace. But let’s be crystal clear: This is not a solution — it’s an opening for Putin to continue his aggression and destabilize Europe.

While Trump brags about his “very good and productive call” with Putin, Jason knows the truth: We cannot afford to reward Putin’s aggression and destruction with empty promises of peace.

And while Trump bullies and threatens our neighbors like Canada and undermines our alliances — all to curry favor with a dictator — Jason truly understands that protecting democracy at home means working hand-in-hand with our democratic allies abroad.

Just last month, Jason was in Munich working to strengthen our global partnerships and alliances. He knows that our strength as a nation comes from the relationships we build with our allies abroad — and he will never stop fighting to defend our democratic values.

Jason is devoted to ensuring that America’s foreign policy is focused on promoting real peace, democracy, and accountability. Will you stand with him by pitching in to support his campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-mar25]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thank you.

— Team Crow

Greenwood Village, CO 80112

subject: your signature is the only one missing…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we’ve reopened our letter for one more hour!
| | **_TIME-SENSITIVE FOLLOW UP FOR: YOU_** Hi there, you were personally chosen as a top Democrat to represent your state in our letter to Rep. Hakeem Jeffries!

Unfortunately, our records indicate you’re the only supporter left who hasn’t responded – we’re hoping this is a mistake!

**We’ve reopened the letter for ONE MORE HOUR to ensure you have a chance to sign.** [**Add your name ASAP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88311?t=6&akid=19345%2E878179%2EG7wY-H) | [**LAST CHANCE TO SIGN THE LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88311?t=7&akid=19345%2E878179%2EG7wY-H)
---
**—BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE—**
**_Hakeem Jeffries Launches Day of Action:_
“Push Back Against the Diabolical Republican Scheme to Enact the _Largest_ Medicaid Cut in History!”**
Leader Jeffries is calling EVERY Democrat to action — but we’re still missing critical support in your state.

**So we’re giving you an exclusive chance to join the fight:** [**Sign our letter thanking Hakeem Jeffries for his hard work and answer his urgent call to action NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88311?t=8&akid=19345%2E878179%2EG7wY-H)
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88311?t=9&akid=19345%2E878179%2EG7wY-H)
[**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88311?t=10&akid=19345%2E878179%2EG7wY-H)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

House Republicans have been nothing more than puppets for Donald Trump: GUTTING Medicaid, THREATENING Social Security, and making Trump a KING!!

I’m so grateful to have you leading the charge to defend our democracy, and for never backing down in the face of MAGA attacks.

**So today, I’m answering your call to action to make sure we flip the House in special elections and STOP Trump in his tracks!**

[**I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to join your critical fight and to help Democrats flip the 3 seats we need to take back control! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88311?t=11&akid=19345%2E878179%2EG7wY-H) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88311?t=12&akid=19345%2E878179%2EG7wY-H) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88311?t=13&akid=19345%2E878179%2EG7wY-H)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
Thanks so much for signing!

\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19345%2E878179%2EG7wY-H). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19345%2E878179%2EG7wY-H).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19345%2E878179%2EG7wY-H) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=19345%2E878179%2EG7wY-H). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19345%2E878179%2EG7wY-H)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=19345%2E878179%2EG7wY-H)

Did you see this note from my team (below)? The long and short of it is this:

**I’m one of the Democrats that Republicans have pledged to defeat in 2026.**

They see flipping our district as their best shot at clinging on to power and emboldening Trump and Elon Musk for another two years.

I know I don’t need to remind you why the stakes are sky-high right now, so just hear me out.

Early grassroots support will make all the difference in our ability to defend this seat and fight back against the Trump agenda. And now that we know Republicans are coming for me, we don’t have a single second to waste.

[**Will you pledge to help me keep CA-45 blue and fight back against Trump and Elon Musk by making a donation to my re-election campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104380973/535176042/1435289434?amount=25&refcode=em_fr_2025.03.23_b1_dt_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTZmMzIxMmItMWYwOC1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TfiWNfQnikp7bjpSPM3moUgL59YXJJKPMfg_81fVYeM=)

_— Derek_

On Thursday, March 20, 2025 **Derek Tran HQ** wrote:

Team,

The National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) just released their list of Democratic House members that they’re _100% committed to defeating_ ... and guess who was front and center on the list.

It’s official.

**Republicans are officially all-in on taking Derek down, flipping CA-45 red, and bringing their dangerous agenda to Southern California.**

[**This is an all-hands-on-deck moment. Will you make a donation to help Derek fight back against the onslaught of attacks that we know will be headed our way?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104380974/535176043/1943818218?amount=25&refcode=em_fr_2025.03.23_b1_dt_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTZmMzIxMmItMWYwOC1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TfiWNfQnikp7bjpSPM3moUgL59YXJJKPMfg_81fVYeM=)

We were the underdogs in 2024.

People counted us out and told us we’d never flip CA-45 from red-to-blue.

So believe us when we say: **After taking MAGA Republicans by surprise last November, they’ll be back with a vengeance to take this seat back and defeat Derek once-and-for-all.**

[**This is bound to be one of the most competitive races in the country, once again, and any amount of National Republican intervention could push this election over the edge. Grassroots supporters like you are the only thing standing in between. So please, will you help us fight back against Republican attacks and defend this swing seat?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104380975/535176044/1943818218?amount=25&refcode=em_fr_2025.03.23_b1_dt_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTZmMzIxMmItMWYwOC1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TfiWNfQnikp7bjpSPM3moUgL59YXJJKPMfg_81fVYeM=)

| Hi Peter, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride. The Democratic Party of Georgia said I could reach out because you have what it takes to stand up in critical moments — and this is one of them. **Yet another GOP politician decided to get his own 15 Minutes of Twitter Fame at my expense.** At a subcommittee hearing, the Republican chairman referred to me as “Mr. McBride.” And when Rep. Bill Keating defended me, the chair _adjourned the hearing_ to avoid acknowledging his own immaturity. **Republicans are a bunch of overgrown schoolyard bullies.** Our constituents shouldn’t have to suffer because Republicans want to act like children. **This pettiness needs to end.** I was there ready to ask questions on nuclear non-proliferation and US support for our democratic allies in Europe. **I ran for Congress to roll up my sleeves and do the job.** No matter what they throw at me, I’m 100% focused on delivering for Delawareans. And if that means listening to their childish insults, _so be it._ [Peter, I’m proud to have the Democratic Party of Georgia’s support at this moment, but we need you with us. subject: James O’Keefe Needs You—Project Veritas Escalates Its Attack!
body:
They think they can cover their tracks, but I won’t let them.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e3154157/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvVXV5VmtQaGtBWg/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTAzMjM/LbmNscTY3dW81Tg/qP2hpZHM9bmNFbTZ1NXpyZjdwejVscw/gZ-BoWw/san0088181b)

| [****](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-BoWw/s7g5be36000)
[****](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-BoWw/s4o245caa9f) Dear Patriot,

I’m James O’Keefe, founder of O’Keefe Media Group (OMG) and Project Veritas, and I’m reaching out because my career—and my ability to keep exposing the truth—is under fire. Project Veritas, the group I built from nothing, has turned against me with a vengeance, and their latest move proves they’ll stop at nothing to bury me.

In 2023, they fired me and sued me, claiming I broke my contract after I launched OMG to continue my investigative work. Now, the case has taken a dark turn. Project Veritas just hired a new, aggressive attorney who’s fighting to hide the identities of insiders who spent months trashing me behind closed doors—spreading lies to justify their coup.

**They think they can cover their tracks, but I won’t let them.**

To get to the truth, [**my legal team needs to depose the four remaining Project Veritas board members**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-BoWw/seg1274d524).

These depositions are our shot to expose the real story: a calculated betrayal by people I trusted. [**But justice isn’t cheap.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-BoWw/s4l1d8193f2)

My attorney just sent an invoice for $12,900—due now—and deposing these board members will cost thousands more. [**Without your help, this fight could grind to a halt**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-BoWw/sdu540d6af3).

**My career as an undercover journalist hangs in the balance.**

If Project Veritas wins, it’s not just me they silence—it’s the truth I’ve spent decades uncovering, from corrupt feds to corporate cronies. I’ve risked everything to bring you hard evidence, and I’m not backing down now. [**But I can’t do it alone.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-BoWw/scn37fe39e4)

[**We need to raise $12,900 TODAY to cover this invoice, plus $20,000 more to fund the depositions.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-BoWw/s9r1253d5f5)

[**Your $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can give puts us one step closer to victory. Donate now—every dollar keeps me in the fight, exposing the Deep State and holding the powerful accountable.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-BoWw/s2o9345f67b)

The clock’s ticking. **Project Veritas wants me crushed** , [**but with you by my side, we can turn the tables. Give today, and let’s show them the truth can’t be silenced**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-BoWw/s1m4c7a4ad4).

For the Truth,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. $12,900 due now. $20,000 for depositions. Ten board members schemed against me—four still need to face the music. [**Donate today—my future, and the future of fearless journalism, depends on it!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-BoWw/sap8a7e74af)

---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **Free Thinker Daily.**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
Rush an urgent donation to help Democracy Defenders win in Wisconsin and beyond
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104381437/535177401/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmZTM5MzY0LTIxMDgtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3ezdtr53bFAv7nlzSzjY03OoZmUwUWa93rfzaE2RnFk=&emci=53aa8126-6a06-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=9fe39364-2108-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045)

Peter, In just over one week, the fair maps movement will face our next big test as voters elect Wisconsin’s next state supreme court justice. **With early voting underway, time is running out to make a difference before polls close on April 1.** This battleground election will decide whether right-wing justices take control of the court. That could make the difference between fair maps or gerrymandering, reproductive freedom or an abortion ban, and voting rights protections or voting rights restrictions. **With groups connected to Elon Musk spending millions of dollars trying to elect the far-right candidate, we have to fight even harder to get out the vote for Democracy Defender Judge Susan Crawford.** [**Will you make a donation right away? We need the full strength of this grassroots movement to help Democracy Defenders win in Wisconsin and beyond.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104381438/535177402/790884352?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_HolderWisconsinTrip_email_20250323-NDRC-Tier1-HolderWisconsinTripLiftNote_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250323-NDRC-Tier1-HolderWisconsinTripLiftNote_&utm_campaign=HolderWisconsinTrip&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmZTM5MzY0LTIxMDgtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3ezdtr53bFAv7nlzSzjY03OoZmUwUWa93rfzaE2RnFk=) Thank you, The NDRC Team \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: NDRC Date: Mon, March 17, 2025 Subject: Where A.G. Eric Holder is right now Peter, one of the biggest elections of 2025 happens in just 15 days. In the Wisconsin Supreme Court race, Democracy Defender Judge Susan Crawford is going up against the full strength of the far-right, including Elon Musk-funded organizations, which are spending millions to try and defeat her. **If it wasn’t already crystal clear before, it is now — extremists will spare no expense to win this seat.** [**We can afford to be outspent, but we have to do everything we can to fight back — so please consider an urgent donation to support our work in Wisconsin and across the country.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104381439/535177403/790884352?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_HolderWisconsinTrip_email_20250323-NDRC-Tier1-HolderWisconsinTripLiftNote_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250323-NDRC-Tier1-HolderWisconsinTripLiftNote_&utm_campaign=HolderWisconsinTrip&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmZTM5MzY0LTIxMDgtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3ezdtr53bFAv7nlzSzjY03OoZmUwUWa93rfzaE2RnFk=) A.G. Eric Holder is on the ground in Wisconsin _right now_ reminding voters about the serious implications the outcome of this race will have for fair maps, free elections, and our fundamental freedoms. My situation is in your hands, Fellow American. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I was working hard in our capital. **Seriously** _**, a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!**_
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Fellow American. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage._If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short. _ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**

clean_body: Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!| | | My situation is in your hands, Fellow American. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising BIG TIME while I was working hard in our capital. Seriously , a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Fellow American. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage.If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! | | Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Fellow American, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. This is a crucial moment in our fight to protect the American people and our democracy. Please add your name before midnight tonight.

| There’s no denying that Elon Musk will do anything it takes to keep the GOP in power and secure more tax breaks for billionaires like himself.

That includes flooding Republican Senate campaigns with millions — or even billions — to win the midterm elections and protect their slim majority. After Trump’s joint address to Congress, he even posted this: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104381950/535178802/-244375549?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.03.23_Senate-Special-1_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDMwNzRmMy0yNTA4LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NyR6VU_SnETk9i-kNC07hOYbzxJpQdtKIyTVliKvN4Y=) We need to shore up resources _now_ to show we have the funds to recruit strong challengers, support our incumbents and flip the four seats we need to take back the majority.

[**_That’s why our team is setting a $20,000 goal for our Red to Blue Fund by tomorrow night at 11:59 p.m. Will you help us stay on track to flip seats in key states blue by pitching in $10 or any amount before midnight tomorrow?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104381951/535178803/-244375549?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.03.23_Senate-Special-1_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDMwNzRmMy0yNTA4LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NyR6VU_SnETk9i-kNC07hOYbzxJpQdtKIyTVliKvN4Y=) | | | [DONATE NOW >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104381952/535178804/-244375549?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.03.23_Senate-Special-1_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDMwNzRmMy0yNTA4LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NyR6VU_SnETk9i-kNC07hOYbzxJpQdtKIyTVliKvN4Y=)

With JD Vance and Marco Rubio stepping down from the Senate and their seats up for special elections, we have the opportunity to flip two more crucial battleground states next year — years before their seats were originally up for reelection. Plus, there are three open seats in Michigan, Minnesota and New Hampshire.

Our odds at winning the Senate look better with _two_ GOP incumbents out of the race. If we take back the Senate, we can block Trump’s extreme agenda and fight for hardworking families in the wake of the GOP’s attacks on Social Security, Medicaid and more. Your support is crucial to helping us bring in the resources needed to win.

[**_Can you help us reach our must-hit Red to Blue Fund goal and keep up our work to flip the Senate by chipping in $10 right now?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104381953/535178805/-244375549?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.03.23_Senate-Special-1_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDMwNzRmMy0yNTA4LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NyR6VU_SnETk9i-kNC07hOYbzxJpQdtKIyTVliKvN4Y=)

Peter—While extreme politicians in D.C. are caught up in chaos and partisan bickering, Kim is staying focused on what really matters: keeping our communities safe.

Nearly 11 years ago, the devastating Oso landslide took 43 lives and destroyed homes across our state. It was the deadliest landslide in U.S. history—**a tragedy we can never let happen again**.

That's why Kim just introduced a bill to reauthorize the National Landslide Preparedness Act through 2028— _because protecting families and strengthening infrastructure should never be a partisan issue_.

This legislation will ensure better data, stronger research, and the critical resources needed to prevent disasters before they happen. Kim is leading the way with real, practical solutions for WA-08. **[Now, let’s show that we have her back. Chip in $5, or whatever you can today, to support Kim’s work for our district.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104382503/535180503/-1764777207?refcode=em25_250323_land_fnd_gq_act___KS4C_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250323_land_fnd_gq_act___KS4C_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=0060a30f-2a08-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&refcode2=0060a30f-2a08-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDYwYTMwZi0yYTA4LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6My4LnVP2m8TYkX1D06goZl-e-Ca6KjGnD7JvW6P-PU=)**

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: What is happening right now is different.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
86,847 people in three days.
At our first stop alone, half the crowd were brand new people not previously on any list of contact. Many were first timers.
What is happening right now is different. We must use this moment to fight back and defend our democracy.
These rallies have been possible because of thousands of people chipping in what they can—without a dime of corporate or lobbyist money.
[Will you donate right now to help our campaign host more town halls?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250323-1.VfEpMF&refcode=em20250323-8414-P_FND_RES_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8414%2E2526796%2E0L5-Ac) Every donation helps us mobilize, organize, and fight for the working class in the places that need it most.
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250323-1.VfEpMF&refcode=em20250323-8414-P_FND_RES_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8414%2E2526796%2E0L5-Ac)**
Pa’lante,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250323-1?refcode=em20250323-8414-P_FND_RES_GRM&t=21&refcode2=8414_2526796_0L5-Ac&akid=8414%2E2526796%2E0L5-Ac)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250323-8414-P_FND_RES_GRM&t=22&akid=8414%2E2526796%2E0L5-Ac)**

---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: This course is more urgent than ever
body:
I recommend you take a little time to start our free online course... Totalitarian Novels.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/HD0F6LURFjKcrt5Q9ZY0aytzX_nPNZSTBy9swnR_0LJ_TQ3R0Tj_1-WrrwYejBU_PKm8EojJsK0rElls66ACk78nvs1xBwSxoZ4G6nWMLaZav5cTjbY2BuMeWOHWzXALGZdfJWE4x7xP7-KrmYUB_FkyuBFq5qlPq9GD44ZF9I6uW8SFGkzadSxc/Y5rtIimLr29ahxTB-Z1B3B8BY2axzHrU/7)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/uOvgU0sTFNHj-j8Itcv1GYf_dXwPedrm__994XWDcbLiwzNTYy7mgx9iBGGWDVbQog4jLAJsZkOkTTfxY6NrFjhuamw5D5RyHKRKh0D6g0hTKgfdfchQDgYLDjaQ-KrGjsWwdkQOq8ol3UAbgFzIvrtpJsbnyNE58R2bHpI2_HJK9uEG--ONo6wY32HCn02Hy1N8KkL8HW3FCVIS8S4GrYLcWGzIDHatR7EMMlcu09D3NhuOtDE-pFToKCTBrkmRz3E5hAd4gdQ2o2SPaCIwmp6Xqq0UqklKrdcvWrNn9Oqj4VeVkjZmGkz9Bu6zEhqK6Yi-lDhI3M76ALjHGR0lXXw55IuChGku0IDYBCYdpVoxM9EJZnOC7SzGWEVT4YZAxTvb1iYzVLBU3jUFBmDrztppgoEuJWPCjqr5hBkjSYe66O7WQL81nmBK1_zqGtBOAVc3mvXC7MghE97by-8/KH2PdpfhDOWj8yPZohZQzjb82zEFZ8cD/7)
| |
Dear Friend,

I recommend you take a little time to start our free online course...

**[Totalitarian Novels](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/25WfwT4k54zLsRDhtuuVYL5spPg01SJuW7na5EneYzRwvddVVt-iBr5w1_J9ITUfVLSypiD-gNoH2JVR17bLfHk90GcQBUBEs2UiQ-6fJNTqw3-cQ_DjtLjetS4zsbcj3rk-NUxD6salp2PMn4LAD1FMzaq_HVTDEtkxPFp_B-bNoaRHzVgd2VWILP5nNZJ2PKHWX3hOBwI3zzP9HxLQJxFFxfw5-hza_WaNun21cIrstxHq2GdCbUQOA8gilZa2rWoSnIbqyPqTfTtTyNwf-UZaK9FvhMTkMETwIdSYJWVMDLAfDOLRoE7xJdZqx8imSrVREh6bThOc4eLljCS3iIDcfegqSUEqWCrTTGdRT_Jjs-qOyYfsGwz3JqYfHD6TDEGQZgCZD1w4RXJ89frKg03Ju2ts5w0_19LsmPxZ74jtW79ToOdkDGPVocQ5R4LgZHSNIP9ls19Fmayhmcc/TgAPRBl_sNTaKoE_XQZQyrUVMm2w0lKr/7).**

You'll be able to learn from my boss--and Hillsdale College President--Larry P. Arnn as he teaches this course through [four novels: George Orwell's _1984_ , Aldous Huxley's _Brave New World_ , Arthur Koestler's _Darkness at Noon_ , and C.S. Lewis's _That Hideous Strength_ (my personal favorite of these four)](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/wz-wQuUKN6VU-0eaVaNwElAt_fM7z-Q5F5Gtqq5lOxayIGsUu80YwVPqzy5vkll_rmAA9W77mQSaSmlLD9nLu9EePhzawUykyCTGQv4hGLjeg_xPHD0xBqPgQKAm8MLFfxE6G3Y2-u-N59_AGvD1IeUrOnrR1V816UV2RQ9v0IgDSZzQe58neC_E-78MwkZVy4yFmAh8ZVqunXAnH5bYEVWf5fqu6-h-85HCprz859U0L4soPwW7LMTbizo2GdVO39Fo2VePZMfi0dD44qYHiCeqXoqmlJ9cDRhUqTaax2wyHYywMGFifnuoy_6RxALby6kctLXwUu8eccAa4ny6cDEa5nrqfRiuvX70fp9x5el06xnFNJNMCT2Ez5vVphXUUQKRX0o04TDl3B9fu2kBxHQifrBReJPVcLMMHcKrf_ZKKn1jFlq-Mcd7naojg9-ClYvMyd0TUvqsy21UtrU/uQTUyPXWXH06lg4YE7D6nJxYwNy2Lg1b/7).

**You 'll find the worlds of these novels are eerily familiar...**

* Endless wars, a surveillance state, and the distortion of history and truth by the media define not only Oceania--the dystopian world of _1984_ --but also contemporary America.
* The drugged and pleasure-obsessed inhabitants of _Brave New World_ reflect a troubling reality in modern America, where addictions to alcohol, fentanyl, pornography, food, gambling, and even social media are on the rise.
* A country stages a show trial for a political figure who fails to conform to ideological orthodoxy--a theme central to _Darkness at Noon_ and a striking parallel to the events of the past several years in American politics.
* If you've heard experts throw around the phrase "Trust the science," you may recognize the bureaucratic despotism of N.I.C.E. (National Institute of Co-ordinated Experiments) in _That Hideous Strength_.

We're at a turning point in our nation's history. After decades of far-Left despotism, the American people have said, "ENOUGH!"

**And that means --we can stop the totalitarian trends and ideologies in our country before they are entirely and utterly irreversible. **

I saw a T-shirt one of our Hillsdale students was sporting this fall, with the clever slogan, "Make 1984 fiction again!" I don't know about you, but I wholeheartedly agree with that sentiment.

That's why we need you to make this course available to as many Americans as possible. It will be one of the most important ways you can recognize the far-Left's totalitarian tendencies.

**[You can do that by supporting"Totalitarian Novels" after you sign-up for the free course today](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/NEmY2BsFGzu0qbvnFEgMwArvdd9kBxBThAjFFmYixrmEwduqV2Ro2lgBzMXOEs-wb2cj1erZWoPLtzK01a5HZLMyybogiKY8AMyf7jbAAZbnejbo34krDLJJH_ClX3Au4nZGa-TiaFDTFn8m9mxVFLALlW7lTWP4_j2elrMwWeOs0NYOREzcrJcdLQqtn8ozdu7ZYb53Di29BcPY3d_y5pybvhSOovRdR5EWuwMBdMidvdo_eX5ItFCHVUdVHtkuSe6UyrctIra4cM5x3i-aTVdyBFLhboh1mqGzkI4kOB9x87C6V_j3tLpCTllgTzKqWkDc3yPGrMjN7cJb5UX5NXh3jI3roVGq-_Om_AEUV5lvViQlwgbb3X9y1P7cHEKkP5Hs8wcMe7dk_QI8eUDkE_o8xbyC9t9QV3fqe-v-qO2l5sq5YnEa27nuyoM8Qs65LKpCLV-ZlxXtKj40u-s/gPQM7ehD0Qvead81lophdGJie6CbOT8d/7).**

>> For your gift of $100 or more, you will receive a video boxset of "Totalitarian Novels" from Hillsdale College. It's one small way we can say "thank you" for your support of our educational outreach.

Your support will help promote this course and sign up as many people--especially young people!--as possible. And you will help us continue to expand our educational outreach even further.

The more people who understand the nature of totalitarianism, the less likely it will gain a foothold in America.

**Will you join us in helping promote this free online course?** You can click on the secure link below to sign up for the course and make your tax-deductible gift:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/totalitarian-novels**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/Ru0w5gpoqsnlDZmZ9QMX4OrG8-_zDAANfjfMt6mJu2j57QTNM6x3uKkQMPiKzWkyzvC-MxF8J1IMlUCUGDMEFv_Bl2XUdfXM43-OhaRgUwsw0KAXFUidPUZ0fZ6KSq9DxWwwK6kuWagkqhD0BWWl5OXHkjGGTewkpE0zZZh9ihk51d2PDHAhXUvaXKl5v9hWiui3CnVL5oHxdDj4kfFKSQLC0hCwoU7oWW2-P5ztS-hfl2Ppt6mgtuo-Kao60pFshFf58X5LhgP8tSG1t2BL_PfnF0m0r7E8QvhP1Jaxy4pYEOFMlh8OvoJ64O4FD8NIotm8aVVungFVMyNAG5p2FyQO0feyM2f5tqxYnSaflxqgpe2mGU5jobmSP_ob9NA8Ndg7V7g5aCksTVT8otgWh6he0LLtFpmAnGRnbGjk35XACBZ-aLdP_iG5Z_gQX9MMM0lzsegV21geH8gwDXY/yjISVcMZpr7_wDfRZ7-81kc8Ut_1_6BP/7)

Whatever your gift is, the most important thing is that I hear back from you right away so that we can promote this course far and wide, especially to our youth.

As our country reverses course AWAY from totalitarianism, Hillsdale's "Totalitarian Novels" free online course is more urgent than ever. By taking it and supporting our efforts to promote it you will help Americans understand the nature of this terrible way of governing and how to stop it from ever happening here.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. **We 've released our free online course..."Totalitarian Novels"!** You can sign up for the course and help us promote it at the secure link below:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/totalitarian-novels**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/JwQUjlTm0npfHBVr2U2vnAsWB2wQGE2m7FluvkU88efa0RzdjoOGKlnaDECWjgKDKrFSr8COS5SYCvDhyHbmert_qGln-VepBN15FkpBq-Kuimy6QXGr7MTfM18j_9r_KHib7JSUYmQWaHtfH_O-kwAiZFWsf9TfudN6M7ri9_RQ3bLWEkkYYg3b7YlRDLwQTvgIfO23KMZE1ub4iLgGRCAIAotALxKNqbaTtbgVyGlyoOSoFW5ULsR5sJHen9wLtsZ2R86lcMWuz6n1CNwYc8QBtmZ2p1sFMdX2VyfHfacLR5bUfTQNtcyCxk4254ga-SW5cuggDlvNpn-_03yXJmWn3SFpvAHI_NoQX1VCphdx-246yf1JvbuSSjc8LaOTjW85f5k9vXeB8LMMc2V5kFcrGkkYrjZSdvu68BIvOAItJOcYlnNDJ7kPAbdE5KJ4XjvhBBQ49ZUn67cK-wg/cQeShc9SarOSA0ce1YfK76t81wy66KhA/7)

This course is essential for helping Americans understand the nature of totalitarianism and preventing it from taking root here, which is why I have a special offer for you today.

For your gift of $100 or more, you will receive a Blu-ray edition of "Totalitarian Novels" from Hillsdale College. It's one small way we can say "thank you."

**Please reach and teach more Americans about the dangers of this regime by helping us promote this free online course today!**

---
[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/A8bdXGt2ltE-qN1IGgR_g-x393epkBZzVOgPdRg1Uc8y-B9ROZuDAuUecWyogs7KC7qGr0WZXGiH-yf3muZG2iPQ_VRATFwejs41S3WelqHU-UyfGvRPhWHuBfcZYPet8k3NQ2b9oBHKNEJIpJmuB8LTzUM2wYK3asFIjzyIyk83vHSD8Bz-S6N31plpeMFVn2t4LcARq5DAd-5ZKGdry15OC6XoNEBF_Q/SjBnll-5fnuOejOsVnwQC6GWOCQcSFQB/7)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/HD0F6LURFjKcrt5Q9ZY0aytzX_nPNZSTBy9swnR_0LJ_TQ3R0Tj_1-WrrwYejBU_PKm8EojJsK0rElls66ACk78nvs1xBwSxoZ4G6nWMLaZav5cTjbY2BuMeWOHWzXALGZdfJWE4x7xP7-KrmYUB_FkyuBFq5qlPq9GD44ZF9I6uW8SFGkzadSxc/Y5rtIimLr29ahxTB-Z1B3B8BY2axzHrU/7).

---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e7ab9660-4c4f-4bdd-8ffe-3673d256a562?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
During the first two months of Trump's second term, I have noticed that the sheer volume of protests has far exceeded what took place in DC during the first months of his first term. I noticed something else, too: the crowds are far older than any time in the past.
What does this tell me? Well, for one it says that young people are not the ones taking to the streets of our nation's capital anymore. Trump gained significant ground on the younger demographic in the most recent election. While MAGA was considered to be a fringe political movement populated mostly by old white men in 2016, it is now the dominant political force in Washington, DC.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..JNHIRY8NHZ7tAW8juJfwqyhVYEmyY-nVBf8Jm4sjlgg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=159562246)
That brings us to the present day, where the protests have been more voluminous and frequent than anything I can recall during my previous 16.5 years in this Godforsaken city.
Another notable difference between these protests and those of the past: they are more censorious than ever before. While protesters were weary of anyone filming during the civil unrest of 2020, this new batch of picketers have taken it to a new level. Take, for example, what happened to my colleague Matt Miller when he dared to wear a DOGE t-shirt to a recent protest in front of the United States Capitol.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8d349b1e-d718-4525-a0c2-c8b752f267f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We experienced similar resistance when confronted at anti-Netanyahu protest on a public street in what was formerly known as "BLM Plaza" in front of the White House:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/df177491-c661-4b79-a79d-6c29535544b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This development begs the question, "what happened to the left?"
When I moved here in 2008, I was pro free speech. On the heels of two Bush terms and the passage of the privacy-destroying Patriot Act, I thought that put me on the political left.
Not so fast. Over the course of Obama's two terms, I watched a transformation take place. The left, at first gradually and eventually all at once, began to coalesce around the radical wing of the party that was so "progressive" that they sought to silence and destroy anyone who didn't view progress on their terms. When Trump took office in 2016, this allegedly empathetic world view was juiced up on steroids and used to justify a wide open border, anti-wall policies and the accusations of racism for anyone who disagreed.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/86f44978-8506-42aa-a6cf-d32dc10d3182?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
At one time in our past, it was the dogmatic Jesuits who coined the phrase, "The end justifies the means." Over time, the Christians have become the open-minded ones, and the so-called progressives are now the keepers of the new dogma: Scientism and the secular worship of the almighty government.
From the moment he came down the golden escalator in 2015, corporate media brands that controlled the news narratives were in cahoots with the Democrats to "RESIST" all things Trump. Fast forward nine years, these atrophied institutions no longer have an iron grip on how Americans perceive the world. The more they lose ground, the more they dig in their heels. Therein lies the genesis of the censorious left. The problem is, the more that never-Trump activist journalists and politicians double down on silencing their enemies, the more they lose people who traditionally voted blue.
The average American does not want to be told what to do. They want to go to work, earn a dignified paycheck, and be left alone inside their homes.
The paradigm-shifting moment happened at the end of Covid, when the group of Americans who were skeptical about big pharma went from being largely granola-eating hippies to hillbillies who voted for Trump (also don't forget black men, who took the vaccine in lower numbers than any other demographic).
When I returned from the pandemic to coach the Georgetown hockey team in the fall of 2021, the head coach had gray hair that reached down to his shoulders.
"Whoah, coach! Check out that hair!" I joked in front of the eighteen to twenty-four-year-old men as we gathered again for the first time in a year.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..JNHIRY8NHZ7tAW8juJfwqyhVYEmyY-nVBf8Jm4sjlgg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=159562246)
"I'm not cutting my hair until every single Trumper gets the jab." He said with conviction in his eyes. He didn't know it, but I hadn't gotten "the jab," although the students surrounding us knew I had the same hillbilly DNA as the MAGA hicks who my coach detested so much.
"Oh really? OK. Well what about all the black people?" I replied.
The guys on the team burst out in laughter because I had said the quiet part out loud. In the midst of the American political pendulum swinging from left to right, I had zeroed in on a critical chink in the armor of the tribal left's contention that it was only the MAGA's who were refusing the vaccine, refusing the military industrial agenda, and refusing the censorship of our discourse that took place during the Black Lives Matter protests and the rollout of the experimental jab. And yet, four years after the BLM BS, more black men cast votes for Trump than they did for any other Republican candidate in the last 48 years. Go figure.
As it turns out, the divide in America is not ultimately between left and right, it's between the Puritans who settled the cities, created the laws, and the Hillbilly entrepreneurs who settled the frontier. Across these two approaches, the American way was forged. It was a bridge between the rugged individualists and those who favored federal power and a nation of laws.
As the political parties of America have oscillated over the centuries, the traditions of the puritans and the hillbillies have identified with different political parties based on the era in which they lived. The Democrat party was once the party of the South and--after William Jennings Bryan's populist movement at the turn of the 20th century--FDR transitioned the Democrat party from the Party of Jim Crow to the party of the working class. Thirty years later JFK and LBJ brought minorities into the fold with their sponsorship of the Civil Rights legislation that reaffirmed the rights of blacks in the South.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..JNHIRY8NHZ7tAW8juJfwqyhVYEmyY-nVBf8Jm4sjlgg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=159562246)
Now sixty years after that, from the ashes of the failed attempt to create a post-Covid "New World Order," a new realignment is taking place. Trump's Republican party has become the party of the working class, and the Democrats have found nothing but repeated failures since their turn towards identity politics, Critical Race Theory, and the idea that the grand narratives upon which our nation were founded needed to be tossed entirely into the wind.
As it turns out, constantly berating the American people with the idea that America is inherently a terrible and racist place will no longer work. The postmodern left's entire ideology was built from the idea that America and its legacy of slavery means that we are a nation whose original sin cannot be undone. Yet over the course of Biden's presidency, millions flooded through a porous border precisely because of the opportunities that this great country can afford anyone lucky enough to reside within its states. The Democrats built their entire worldview around critiquing the status quo, the problem here is that a critique is not an ideology that can stand on its own... or at least not for very long.
That's why young people, minorities, and independents abandoned the Democrat party by the millions in 2024. They are sick and tired of being told that their country is bad, that unfettered immigration is good, and shut up if you disagree.
This transition from being the party of free speech and anti-war, to the party that touts an endorsement from a NeoCon like Liz Cheney or her dad, Dick, and a party that supports censorship online, is exactly why the Democrats have found themselves in the disempowered position that they occupy today.
At its core, Trump's popular-vote victory was due to one simple fact: he was running as a change candidate, while Kamala Harris was not. Trump was running as an outsider who would upset the status quo in Washington, and Kamala ran as the inheritor of the Uniparty that has screwed over working class Democrats and Republicans alike for over 40 years. The fake moral superiority that originally kept so many from voting for Trump is evaporating more and more by the day. The victim mentality has been shown for what it is: a shameless power grab that has less to do with empowering the disenfranchised, and more to do with the power brokering elites maintaining control of the present state of affairs. The worship of Saint Fauci over God and the utter failure of "trusting the science" to remedy the pandemic has shown America the house of cards that was pandering as a sturdy foundation of rigorous research and truth.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..JNHIRY8NHZ7tAW8juJfwqyhVYEmyY-nVBf8Jm4sjlgg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=159562246)
The strategy of shouting down skeptics as "anti-vaxxers" or "conspiracy theorists" has yielded the opposite effect from what was intended. If the left wants to blame anyone for Trump's return to the White House, they should look no further than their policies over the last ten years. If they want to claim victim status, then the should look to the policies that victimized hard working Americans: shuttering their businesses, forcing a brand new drug into their veins, all after shipping well-paying middle class jobs overseas.
The party of tolerance has become the party of get onboard with my agenda or else. The postmodern left no longer brings new ideas to the discourse because their dogmatic ideology is as rigid as the Catholic Church. This means that it is the left who is striving to conserve the current paradigm rather than to create something new.
Trump's coalition with Christians, working class men and women looking to renew the dignity of the middle class, minorities, and youngins has shown that the Republicans are a more diverse party then the Democrats would want you to perceive. Trump's experience with a two-tiered justice system and endless censorship pounded his platform into one that encourages open debate and a return to equal justice for all, not just those who fall within one's own political tribe.
The Republican party was originally founded in the 1850's as an anti-slavery party. After the Civil War, they dominated America's national politics for over forty years. This was during the Gilded Age, and as the gap between the rich and the poor grew ever wider, the Democrats were provided with an opportunity to steal the working class vote from the GOP.
Today, at yet another period when the middle class is struggling to make ends meet, the Republicans are the ones stealing the Dem platform from under their feet. What the future holds is yet unclear, but if previous American political shifts are any indicator, the Democrats have a long road of losing ahead.

name: Blake Gendebien
subject: This is a critical moment for our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
It’s Blake Gendebien, the Democrat running to replace Elise Stefanik. Here’s what we know about the upcoming special election in NY-21...
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87155?refcode=em20250323-8839&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8839%2E614464%2EGXupfk)
Peter, it’s Blake Gendebien, the Democrat running to replace Elise Stefanik. Here’s what we know about the upcoming special election in NY-21:
➔ Elise Stefanik has already had her confirmation hearing, and she could resign any day now.
➔ Her resignation will trigger our special election, giving us less than 90 days to campaign across the North Country.
➔ Republicans have already started running ads attacking me, so this is a critical moment for our campaign.

name: Gay Valimont

body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
It’s Gay Valimont. There are 9 days left in my campaign, and since 1994, my district has been Red, but we have accomplished something historical: force Republicans to drop thousands on a general election.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/7A54504F6634492B46566D496F52387576376439546C4934587A37766A6D7A565855776964697978572B69734552356E696B7934646C37793045304F73487733/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-03-23%20at%204.16.29%E2%80%AFPM.png]
Whether you are a registered Dem, one of the 11.54% independents, or are dissatisfied with our government, the math doesn’t lie: we have the numbers to win, all we have to do is spread the word and vote.
But that is not feasible without the funds to back it up. In this last leg, I need to be hitting our final fundraising goals to put the cherry on top of this campaign: a big win. Help me hit $1,500 for the week ASAP!! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]
