name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point Action
subject: URGENT: Tied race in Wisconsin
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1lmoy7nzkd20ly1bn46gb0rvfiyd54w7oc3rv38drgcr9y18535nyqodeu7pgbavdezllq4b6kf3l7ivg50&__stmp=stlki3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stlki3&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6djnldr000btlq7ng7a10mndw84hh5k4ffk3tbt8104xcbb4uee0q7vm3c58ywwc9ok1i606zota0f92vkqgyy9ookvd7w4prtv6uhkk7hd96d6xir05b9cbf8uhutx7xks3by7judejnq08gxntr&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stlki3&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stlki3&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stlki3&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stlki3&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6djnldr000btlq7ng7a10mndwtdknpc2axhmjqzxa6t7xvlgsulzwq2cxiaoo165n8h486vyur5uo5oeqdvku8hy3zsw6t2arqm1pcskg87mb24n3sj9nico2js5rkqd6mbf2qawuygz0hbo5uljj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stlki3&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stlki3&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Mark Takano
subject: re: Tesla car show at The White House >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
The South Lawn is not a Tesla dealership!
| [ ](https://takano4ca.us/l/YU9LnrPIcNC8?t=iYgc4xjP0bYF)
---
**This sh*t is embarrassing.** [ ](https://takano4ca.us/l/5IYIWEAnU3pc) Creepy billionaire Elon Musk and his creepy Co-President, Donald Trump turned the South Lawn of the White House into a Tesla dealership. **_What are we doing here?_**

I guess this is their desperate attempt to boost Elon’s net worth after the price of his Tesla stock plummeted nearly 50% in just 3 months? But let’s be honest, Peter – what they really want is another massive tax break for billionaires and mega-corporations.

So they’re setting their leering eyes on cuts to Social Security. **Elon’s already laid the groundwork to go after Social Security payments. First, he called it a ponzi scheme. Then, he called Social Security an entitlement.**

**Are you kidding me?!?!** Hard working Americans have sacrificed for and paid into Social Security _for decades._ It _isn’t_ an entitlement. **It’s their hard-earned money. And I’ll be damned if I let Elon lay one finger on it.**

**Unless we fight back, Trump and Elon are going to keep gutting working Americans until they’ve hoarded every last penny for themselves. I won't stand for it.**

[**Look, Peter – the only way we stop greedy creeps like Elon and Trump from peeling back centuries of progress is by stepping up right now to flip the House. And with just a few seats needed to flip the House, 2025 Special Elections allow us to do something historic. So can I count on you to boost Democrats to victory in 2025 Special Elections and do your part to save critical programs like Social Security? »**](https://takano4ca.us/l/SGDtwXVEvMuN) | [CHIP IN $7 TO FLIP THE MAGA MAJORITY! »](https://takano4ca.us/l/MHcNp21Xi5gR)

body:

Sorry for interrupting your Sunday, Peter, but this is important — and I’ll keep it brief.

We’re just about a week away from our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the year.

With everything we’re up against — chaos from the Republicans in D.C., dark money spending by Elon Musk, and the radical Trump agenda — hitting our goals is crucial to building a lasting movement that can weather the storm.

So if you can, will you take a moment today to pitch into my campaign?

You can use this link:

Thanks for your help! Enjoy the rest of your day.

— Tina

**Closing the curtains on my campaign.**

I'm at my wits' end, Peter.

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.

In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat and DC Democrat machine has already pledged even more against my reelection.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will we lose my House seat, Republicans WILL lose the House. It'll be Democrats impeaching Trump and stonewalling the AMERICA FIRST agenda all over again.
**[Peter, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/Us97jf_4hzRwiY51aI1Go3k05rqlqtVgqelkZskNEfgem-m0CQNGf5eO0zgUjlp1MQXDfyqSvgbDy-rm_yBkFMM6ghlJSnVOrj1-Bgq6-exmAesAPjgKKDkzAiOBNLHBvY-6S-pyXVL5krkzNsWqqTjTZRXLrCp1fDBoZ1OLjka8ddJYLeutJR-r8856E7elT3UpuXO8AqAfxpiI7WfhT3rFNXLmMwdqiFULZry3TOT-iQThMjJyBOwXNH1X9-8vVwPM7jmhwh0YEObsu-tvvtyOnycQAsAlQGOk4TOJN6DAwDoMi93iaS8-Lez6c3hjlm4MCiEJVwTIXpClwLN_ETSAjSB6CKuj8u5f878TFcy3AibZZlb3hCH6ouBgBBQ1dYMbbwa2p1s7mD7pyTG0zJ-w8XY7q0WTFirRzbs2lqsUlfD16QfXz--kp_r1msThJYlol-SndcWNvGNeheX0Samy6TRdmay-b-AAVG-rBo7bKufk5-q6sHmzUgbG-koKnwyI31nbZzU-6Fwbapruu1FA-bYfbOw10v--olpz3BU4_BPqvxAtSg/trkhhH21rCqU_sQZmPS_yELNdHFM9X8x/7 "Peter, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.")**
_**In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party.**_

If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

_**[But if you can chip in just $5 right now](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/p3Em-LeRgrSeTUAFXIe-1khzYQZ7unbf2MQ6-gaiYnvLvcPLx31CEsgBudURA3IE5FVlEyOmRCzmoE5X07OgFlGgeorjKc6PWtxfbfVMUAqUR00mD7bYdJXCBWK3qOnNKtZTCAShK80nW1rCz6uJ2Z4Hy0BzFJAXRoqx_IPGWrSYR82t1YPxERzlMmpjkubbMVDOyrUt9J6OwVqvUfuC-60CeHJTY3b-mFcGXXR-adou1hpIIOLLLNZ88U2_ykeR9Xiw-Eu39xHi_wTON6pLY9Ew9nCWurjYx-7OP7esYEfeHCg0dLt59nzAiyoduFV04KAmRBlWGnyXRO6d_vwyEzEk60gkFaUqa6adx_cfiiXkNBu9xquTRE23_fUUsgSPWlPRitIhO3xtPDY4dl3csn0s8PXV7cfRu7JKwm3xvhTLdMfYwC2GAtbYCzFh95Tq2bpfa3CkdjC8Ys8J1hI6NOrHP4udFGFHbKYSF63ZvOTk0wUREOOtLPIKinJHgrGrIi97VT0nUQlm0yYYfjRmDyxH1Qgj1-Je7nN7nOgInukRcI-42QPO8w/nxOwI8QrUb1fUGd6fVrDkuZyDK9AVLsy/7 "But if you can chip in just $5 right now")**_ , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=86512f1d4332483dad2e0d56215fd507&_e=sWKfPOQ7IrHC0KiEz-WFyo2CUNVbBJNIl7MX_9jClVA0FXf90ngpiB_WZG4aa2emSHsRgR6L6BzNn-Z7sJep_E3KXYVb3iia4t_1vuXfwuBHj8k-vjL__tckvU-__ZqEKFmaeBVYj0oXSerM9ECNE56fHsJ6IE4X-wk2QnxpIYAGh9ZPogpUxYH_Ou1Pq-sKVb2oxZge0gBsE1Au2oridDFTJlmV0aAqkvSrAlHYNrtPkAUp6OwGnPQCBHAqFKkOogLkB09Dchr1eMuHBQLH9TaV5OOZfwJgxusX9Q8E51urEKXI15MNrttBfErXj_f_FxqrbYHOtXOKFpGExZ0fgA%3D%3D)

body:
Right-wing billionaires are using their fortunes to bankroll extreme Republicans and fund their self-serving agendas in the states. But here’s the good news: | | |
---
| |
---|---
**$6,000,000.** That’s how much PACs tied to right-wing billionaire Elon Musk have dumped into Wisconsin’s all-important state Supreme Court race. **Let’s put that into perspective:**
* A **$6,000,000** investment could buy **well over half a million orders of Culver’s Cheese Curds.**
* A **$6,000,000** investment could buy **667,407 6-packs of Spotted Cow beer.**
* **$6,000,000** is the total of **857,142 donations of $7 to the DLCC** and our movement to elect state Dems.

[One $7 donation from you, paired with thousands will ensure our state Democrats across the country can continue competing against GOP mega-donors like Elon Musk. That’s how much PACs tied to right-wing billionaire Elon Musk have dumped into Wisconsin’s all-important state Supreme Court race. Let’s put that into perspective: A $6,000,000 investment could buy well over half a million orders of Culver’s Cheese Curds.
